3644 goto cleanup;
3645 }
3646
3647# define RETROFLAT_COLOR_TABLE_ALLEGRO_INIT( i, name_l, name_u, r, g, b, cgac, cgad ) \
3648 g_retroflat_state->palette[i] = makecol( r, g, b );
3649
3650 RETROFLAT_COLOR_TABLE( RETROFLAT_COLOR_TABLE_ALLEGRO_INIT )
3651
3652 LOCK_FUNCTION( retroflat_on_close_button );
3653 set_close_button_callback( retroflat_on_close_button );
3654
3655# ifndef RETROFLAT_OS_DOS
3656 if( NULL != args->title ) {
3657 retroflat_set_title( args->title );
3658 }
3659
3660 /* XXX: Broken in DOS. */
3661 if( 0 > install_mouse() ) {
3662 allegro_message( "could not setup mouse!" );
3663 retval = RETROFLAT_ERROR_MOUSE;
3664 goto cleanup;
3665 }
3666# endif /* !RETROFLAT_OS_DOS */
3667
3668# ifdef RETROFLAT_OS_DOS
3669# if 0
3670 regs.w.ax = 0x9;
3671 regs.w.bx = 0x0;
3672 regs.w.cx = 0x0;
3673 regs.x.edx = FP_OFF( g_retroflat_state->mouse_cursor );
3674 sregs.es = FP_SEG( g_retroflat_state->mouse_cursor );
3675 int386x( 0x33, &regs, &regs, &sregs );
3676# endif
3677# endif /* RETROFLAT_OS_DOS */
3678
3679 g_retroflat_state->buffer.b =
3680 create_bitmap( args->screen_w, args->screen_h );
3681 maug_cleanup_if_null(
3682 BITMAP*, g_retroflat_state->buffer.b, RETROFLAT_ERROR_GRAPHICS );
3683
3684# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_SDL1 )
3685
3686 /* == SDL1 == */
3687
3688 /* Random seed. */
3689 srand( time( NULL ) );
3690
3691 /* Startup SDL. */
3692 if( SDL_Init( SDL_INIT_VIDEO ) ) {
3693 retroflat_message( RETROFLAT_MSG_FLAG_ERROR,
3694 "Error", "Error initializing SDL: %s", SDL_GetError() );
3695 retval = RETROFLAT_ERROR_ENGINE;
3696 goto cleanup;
3697 }
3698
3699 /* Get info on best available video mode. */
3700 info = SDL_GetVideoInfo();
3701 maug_cleanup_if_null_alloc( SDL_VideoInfo*, info );
3702
3703 debug_printf( 3, "maximum window size: %ux%u",
3704 info->current_w, info->current_h );
3705
3706# ifndef RETROFLAT_OS_WIN
3707
3708 /* TODO: Maximum screen size detection returns bogus values in Windows! */
3709
3710 /* Setup default screen position. */
3711 if( 0 == args->screen_x ) {
3712 /* Get screen width so we can center! */
3713 args->screen_x = (info->current_w / 2) -
3714 (g_retroflat_state->screen_w / 2);
3715 }
3716
3717 if( 0 == args->screen_y ) {
3718 /* Get screen height so we can center! */
3719 args->screen_y = (info->current_h / 2) -
3720 (g_retroflat_state->screen_h / 2);
3721 }
3722
3723 maug_snprintf( sdl_video_parms, 255, "SDL_VIDEO_WINDOW_POS=%d,%d",
3724 args->screen_x, args->screen_y );
3725 putenv( sdl_video_parms );
3726
3727# endif /* !RETROFLAT_OS_WIN */
3728
3729 /* Setup color palettes. */
3730# ifdef RETROFLAT_OPENGL
3731# define RETROFLAT_COLOR_TABLE_SDL( idx, name_l, name_u, r, g, b, cgac, cgad ) \
3732 g_retroflat_state->palette[idx] = RETROGLU_COLOR_ ## name_u;
3733# else
3734# define RETROFLAT_COLOR_TABLE_SDL( idx, name_l, name_u, rd, gd, bd, cgac, cgad ) \
3735 g_retroflat_state->palette[idx].r = rd; \
3736 g_retroflat_state->palette[idx].g = gd; \
3737 g_retroflat_state->palette[idx].b = bd;
3738# endif /* RETROFLAT_OPENGL */
3739 RETROFLAT_COLOR_TABLE( RETROFLAT_COLOR_TABLE_SDL )
3740
3741# ifdef RETROFLAT_OPENGL
3742 if(
3743 RETROFLAT_FLAGS_UNLOCK_FPS == (RETROFLAT_FLAGS_UNLOCK_FPS & args->flags)
3744 ) {
3745 SDL_GL_SetAttribute( SDL_GL_SWAP_CONTROL, 0 );
3746 }
3747 SDL_GL_SetAttribute( SDL_GL_RED_SIZE, 5 );
3748 SDL_GL_SetAttribute( SDL_GL_GREEN_SIZE, 5 );
3749 SDL_GL_SetAttribute( SDL_GL_BLUE_SIZE, 5 );
3750 do {
3751 /* Retry with smaller depth buffers if this fails. */
3752 gl_retval = SDL_GL_SetAttribute( SDL_GL_DEPTH_SIZE, gl_depth );
3753 if( gl_retval ) {
3754 error_printf( "unable to set depth buffer to %d!", gl_depth );
3755 gl_depth -= 4;
3756 }
3757 } while( gl_retval );
3758 SDL_GL_SetAttribute( SDL_GL_DOUBLEBUFFER, 1 );
3759# endif /* RETROFLAT_OPENGL */
3760
3761 if( NULL != args->title ) {
3762 retroflat_set_title( args->title );
3763 }
3764
3765# ifdef RETROFLAT_SDL_ICO
3766 debug_printf( 1, "setting SDL window icon..." );
3767 icon = SDL_LoadBMP_RW(
3768 SDL_RWFromConstMem( obj_ico_sdl_ico_bmp,
3769 obj_ico_sdl_ico_bmp_len ), 1 );
3770 maug_cleanup_if_null( SDL_Surface*, icon, RETROFLAT_ERROR_BITMAP );
3771 SDL_WM_SetIcon( icon, 0 ); /* TODO: Constant mask. */
3772# endif /* RETROFLAT_SDL_ICO */
3773
3774 g_retroflat_state->buffer.surface = SDL_SetVideoMode(
3775 g_retroflat_state->screen_w, g_retroflat_state->screen_h,
3776 info->vfmt->BitsPerPixel,
3777 SDL_DOUBLEBUF | SDL_HWSURFACE | SDL_ANYFORMAT
3778# ifdef RETROFLAT_OPENGL
3779 | SDL_OPENGL
3780# endif /* RETROFLAT_OPENGL */
3781 );
3782 maug_cleanup_if_null(
3783 SDL_Surface*, g_retroflat_state->buffer.surface,
3784 RETROFLAT_ERROR_GRAPHICS );
3785
3786 /* Setup key repeat. */
3787 if(
3788 RETROFLAT_FLAGS_KEY_REPEAT == (RETROFLAT_FLAGS_KEY_REPEAT & args->flags)
3789 ) {
3790 if( 0 != SDL_EnableKeyRepeat(
3791 1, SDL_DEFAULT_REPEAT_INTERVAL
3792 ) ) {
3793 error_printf( "could not enable key repeat!" );
3794 } else {
3795 debug_printf( 3, "key repeat enabled" );
3796 }
3797 }
3798
3799# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_SDL2 )
3800
3801 /* == SDL2 == */
3802
3803 srand( time( NULL ) );
3804
3805 if( SDL_Init( SDL_INIT_VIDEO ) ) {
3806 retroflat_message( RETROFLAT_MSG_FLAG_ERROR,
3807 "Error", "Error initializing SDL: %s", SDL_GetError() );
3808 retval = RETROFLAT_ERROR_ENGINE;
3809 goto cleanup;
3810 }
3811
3812 /* Setup color palettes. */
3813# ifdef RETROFLAT_OPENGL
3814# define RETROFLAT_COLOR_TABLE_SDL( idx, name_l, name_u, r, g, b, cgac, cgad ) \
3815 g_retroflat_state->palette[idx] = RETROGLU_COLOR_ ## name_u;
3816# else
3817# define RETROFLAT_COLOR_TABLE_SDL( idx, name_l, name_u, rd, gd, bd, cgac, cgad ) \
3818 g_retroflat_state->palette[idx].r = rd; \
3819 g_retroflat_state->palette[idx].g = gd; \
3820 g_retroflat_state->palette[idx].b = bd;
3821# endif /* RETROFLAT_OPENGL */
3822 RETROFLAT_COLOR_TABLE( RETROFLAT_COLOR_TABLE_SDL )
3823
3824 /* Create the main window. */
3825 g_retroflat_state->window = SDL_CreateWindow( args->title,
3826 SDL_WINDOWPOS_CENTERED, SDL_WINDOWPOS_CENTERED,
3827 args->screen_w, args->screen_h, RETROFLAT_WIN_FLAGS );
3828 maug_cleanup_if_null( SDL_Window*, g_retroflat_state->window, RETROFLAT_ERROR_GRAPHICS );
3829
3830 /* Create the main renderer. */
3831 g_retroflat_state->buffer.renderer = SDL_CreateRenderer(
3832 g_retroflat_state->window, -1,
3833 SDL_RENDERER_ACCELERATED | SDL_RENDERER_TARGETTEXTURE );
3834 maug_cleanup_if_null(
3835 SDL_Renderer*, g_retroflat_state->buffer.renderer,
3836 RETROFLAT_ERROR_GRAPHICS );
3837
3838 /* Create the buffer texture. */
3839 g_retroflat_state->buffer.texture =
3840 SDL_CreateTexture( g_retroflat_state->buffer.renderer,
3841 SDL_PIXELFORMAT_RGBA8888, SDL_TEXTUREACCESS_TARGET,
3842 g_retroflat_state->screen_w, g_retroflat_state->screen_h );
3843
3844 /* TODO: This doesn't seem to do anything. */
3845 if(
3846 RETROFLAT_FLAGS_SCALE2X == (RETROFLAT_FLAGS_SCALE2X & args->flags)
3847 ) {
3848 debug_printf( 1, "setting SDL window scale to 2x..." );
3849 SDL_RenderSetScale( g_retroflat_state->buffer.renderer, 2.0f, 2.0f );
3850 }
3851
3852# ifdef RETROFLAT_SDL_ICO
3853 debug_printf( 1, "setting SDL window icon..." );
3854 icon = SDL_LoadBMP_RW(
3855 SDL_RWFromConstMem( obj_ico_sdl_ico_bmp,
3856 obj_ico_sdl_ico_bmp_len ), 1 );
3857 maug_cleanup_if_null( SDL_Surface*, icon, RETROFLAT_ERROR_BITMAP );
3858 SDL_SetWindowIcon( g_retroflat_state->window, icon );
3859# endif /* RETROFLAT_SDL_ICO */
3860
3861# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_WIN16 ) || defined( RETROFLAT_API_WIN32 )
3862
3863 /* == Win16/Win32 == */
3864
3865# ifdef RETROFLAT_API_WINCE
3866 srand( GetTickCount() );
3867# else
3868 srand( time( NULL ) );
3869# endif /* RETROFLAT_API_WINCE */
3870
3871 /* Setup color palettes. */
3872 /* TODO: For WinG, try to make the indexes match system palette? */
3873# ifdef RETROFLAT_OPENGL
3874# define RETROFLAT_COLOR_TABLE_WIN( idx, name_l, name_u, r, g, b, cgac, cgad ) \
3875 g_retroflat_state->palette[idx] = RETROGLU_COLOR_ ## name_u;
3876# else
3877# define RETROFLAT_COLOR_TABLE_WIN( idx, name_l, name_u, r, g, b, cgac, cgad ) \
3878 g_retroflat_state->palette[idx] = RGB( r, g, b );
3879# endif /* RETROFLAT_OPENGL */
3880
3881 RETROFLAT_COLOR_TABLE( RETROFLAT_COLOR_TABLE_WIN )
3882
3883# ifdef RETROFLAT_WING
3884 debug_printf( 3, "attempting to link WinG..." );
3885 /* Dynamically load the WinG procedures. */
3886# ifdef RETROFLAT_API_WIN32
3887 g_w.module = LoadLibrary( "wing32.dll" );
3888 if( (HMODULE)NULL == g_w.module ) {
3889# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_WIN16 )
3890 g_w.module = LoadLibrary( "wing.dll" );
3891 if( HINSTANCE_ERROR == g_w.module ) {
3892# endif
3893 g_w.success = 0;
3894 } else {
3895 g_w.success = 1;
3896
3897# ifdef RETROFLAT_API_WIN32
3898# define RETROFLAT_WING_LLTABLE_LOAD_PROC( retval, proc, ord ) \
3899 g_w.proc = (proc ## _t)GetProcAddress( g_w.module, #proc ); \
3900 if( (proc ## _t)NULL == g_w.proc ) { \
3901 g_w.success = 0; \
3902 }
3903# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_WIN16 )
3904# define RETROFLAT_WING_LLTABLE_LOAD_PROC( retval, proc, ord ) \
3905 g_w.proc = (proc ## _t)GetProcAddress( \
3906 g_w.module, MAKEINTRESOURCE( ord ) ); \
3907 if( (proc ## _t)NULL == g_w.proc ) { \
3908 retroflat_message( \
3909 RETROFLAT_MSG_FLAG_ERROR, "Error", \
3910 "Unable to link WinG proc: %s", #proc ); \
3911 g_w.success = 0; \
3912 }
3913# endif /* RETROFLAT_API_WIN16 || RETROFLAT_API_WIN32 */
3914
3915 RETROFLAT_WING_LLTABLE( RETROFLAT_WING_LLTABLE_LOAD_PROC )
3916
3917 }
3918
3919 if( !g_w.success ) {
3920 retroflat_message( RETROFLAT_MSG_FLAG_ERROR,
3921 "Error", "Unable to link WinG!" );
3922 }
3923# endif /* RETROFLAT_WING */
3924
3925 /* Get the *real* size of the window, including titlebar. */
3926 wr.right = g_retroflat_state->screen_w;
3927 wr.bottom = g_retroflat_state->screen_h;
3928# ifndef RETROFLAT_API_WINCE
3929 AdjustWindowRect( &wr, RETROFLAT_WIN_STYLE, FALSE );
3930# endif /* !RETROFLAT_API_WINCE */
3931
3932 memset(
3933 &(g_retroflat_state->buffer), '\0', sizeof( struct RETROFLAT_BITMAP ) );
3934
3935 debug_printf( 1, "retroflat: creating window class..." );
3936
3937 memset( &wc, '\0', sizeof( WNDCLASS ) );
3938
3939 wc.lpfnWndProc = (WNDPROC)&WndProc;
3940 wc.hInstance = g_retroflat_instance;
3941# ifdef RETROFLAT_ICO_RES_ID
3942 wc.hIcon = LoadIcon(
3943 g_retroflat_instance, MAKEINTRESOURCE( RETROFLAT_ICO_RES_ID ) );
3944# endif /* RETROFLAT_ICO_RES_ID */
3945 wc.hCursor = LoadCursor( 0, IDC_ARROW );
3946 wc.hbrBackground = (HBRUSH)( COLOR_BTNFACE + 1 );
3947 /* wc.lpszMenuName = MAKEINTRESOURCE( IDR_MAINMENU ); */
3948 wc.lpszClassName = RETROFLAT_WINDOW_CLASS;
3949
3950 if( !RegisterClass( &wc ) ) {
3951 retroflat_message( RETROFLAT_MSG_FLAG_ERROR,
3952 "Error", "Could not register window class!" );
3953 goto cleanup;
3954 }
3955
3956 debug_printf( 1, "retroflat: creating window..." );
3957
3958# ifdef RETROFLAT_SCREENSAVER
3959 if( (HWND)0 != g_retroflat_state->parent ) {
3960 /* Shrink the child window into the parent. */
3961 debug_printf( 1, "retroflat: using window parent: %p",
3962 g_retroflat_state->parent );
3963 window_style = WS_CHILD;
3964 GetClientRect( g_retroflat_state->parent, &wr );
3965 } else if(
3966 RETROFLAT_FLAGS_SCREENSAVER ==
3967 (RETROFLAT_FLAGS_SCREENSAVER & g_retroflat_state->retroflat_flags)
3968 ) {
3969 /* Make window fullscreen and on top. */
3970 window_style_ex = WS_EX_TOPMOST;
3971 window_style = WS_POPUP | WS_VISIBLE;
3972 /* X/Y are hardcoded to zero below, so just get desired window size. */
3973 wr.left = 0;
3974 wr.top = 0;
3975 wr.right = GetSystemMetrics( SM_CXSCREEN );
3976 wr.bottom = GetSystemMetrics( SM_CYSCREEN );
3977 } else {
3978# endif /* RETROFLAT_SCREENSAVER */
3979# ifndef RETROFLAT_API_WINCE
3980 /* Open in a centered window. */
3981 ww = wr.right - wr.left;
3982 wh = wr.bottom - wr.top;
3983 if( 0 == args->screen_x ) {
3984 args->screen_x = (GetSystemMetrics( SM_CXSCREEN ) / 2) - (ww / 2);
3985 }
3986 if( 0 == args->screen_y ) {
3987 args->screen_y = (GetSystemMetrics( SM_CYSCREEN ) / 2) - (wh / 2);
3988 }
3989# endif /* !RETROFLAT_API_WINCE */
3990# ifdef RETROFLAT_SCREENSAVER
3991 }
3992# endif /* RETROFLAT_SCREENSAVER */
3993
3994 g_retroflat_state->window = CreateWindowEx(
3995 window_style_ex, RETROFLAT_WINDOW_CLASS, args->title,
3996 window_style,
3997# ifdef RETROFLAT_API_WINCE
3998 0, 0, CW_USEDEFAULT, CW_USEDEFAULT,
3999# else
4000 args->screen_x, args->screen_y, ww, wh,
4001# endif /* RETROFLAT_API_WINCE */
4002# ifdef RETROFLAT_SCREENSAVER
4003 g_retroflat_state->parent
4004# else
4005 0
4006# endif /* RETROFLAT_SCREENSAVER */
4007 , 0, g_retroflat_instance, 0
4008 );
4009
4010# ifdef RETROFLAT_API_WINCE
4011 /* Force screen size. */
4012 GetClientRect( g_retroflat_state->window, &wr );
4013 g_retroflat_state->screen_w = wr.right - wr.left;
4014 g_retroflat_state->screen_h = wr.bottom - wr.top;
4015# endif /* RETROFLAT_API_WINCE */
4016
4017 if( !g_retroflat_state->window ) {
4018 retroflat_message( RETROFLAT_MSG_FLAG_ERROR,
4019 "Error", "Could not create window!" );
4020 retval = RETROFLAT_ERROR_GRAPHICS;
4021 goto cleanup;
4022 }
4023
4024 maug_cleanup_if_null_alloc( HWND, g_retroflat_state->window );
4025
4026#ifndef RETROFLAT_OPENGL
4027 RETROFLAT_COLOR_TABLE( RETROFLAT_COLOR_TABLE_WIN_BRSET )
4028 RETROFLAT_COLOR_TABLE( RETROFLAT_COLOR_TABLE_WIN_PNSET )
4029#endif /* !RETROFLAT_OPENGL */
4030
4031 ShowWindow( g_retroflat_state->window, g_retroflat_cmd_show );
4032
4033# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_LIBNDS )
4034
4035 /* == Nintendo DS == */
4036
4037 /* Setup color constants. */
4038# define RETROFLAT_COLOR_TABLE_NDS_RGBS_INIT( idx, name_l, name_u, r, g, b, cgac, cgad ) \
4039 g_retroflat_state->palette[idx] = ARGB16( 1, r, g, b );
4040 RETROFLAT_COLOR_TABLE( RETROFLAT_COLOR_TABLE_NDS_RGBS_INIT )
4041
4042 /* Force screen size. */
4043 args->screen_w = 256;
4044 args->screen_h = 192;
4045
4046 powerOn( POWER_ALL );
4047
4048# ifdef RETROFLAT_OPENGL
4049
4050 debug_printf( 3, "setting up GL subsystem..." );
4051
4052 videoSetMode( MODE_0_3D );
4053
4054 vramSetBankA( VRAM_A_TEXTURE );
4055
4056 glInit();
4057
4058 /* TODO: Setup NDS 3D engine! */
4059
4060# else
4061 videoSetMode( MODE_5_2D );
4062 videoSetModeSub( MODE_0_2D );
4063
4064 /* Setup the upper screen for background and sprites. */
4065 vramSetBankA( VRAM_A_MAIN_BG );
4066 vramSetBankB( VRAM_B_MAIN_SPRITE );
4067
4068 /* Setup the lower screen for background and sprites. */
4069 vramSetBankC( VRAM_C_MAIN_BG );
4070 vramSetBankD( VRAM_D_SUB_SPRITE );
4071
4072 bgExtPaletteEnable();
4073
4074 /* Setup the background engine. */
4075
4076 /* Put map at base 2, but stow tiles up after the bitmap BG at base 7. */
4077 g_retroflat_state->bg_id =
4078 bgInit( 0, BgType_Text8bpp, BgSize_T_256x256, 2, 7 );
4079 dmaFillWords( 0, g_retroflat_state->bg_tiles,
4080 sizeof( g_retroflat_state->bg_tiles ) );
4081 bgSetPriority( g_retroflat_state->bg_id, 2 );
4082
4083 /* Put map at base 3, and tiles at base 0. */
4084 g_retroflat_state->window_id =
4085 bgInit( 1, BgType_Text8bpp, BgSize_T_256x256, 3, 0 );
4086 dmaFillWords( 0, g_retroflat_state->window_tiles,
4087 sizeof( g_retroflat_state->window_tiles ) );
4088 bgSetPriority( g_retroflat_state->window_id, 1 );
4089
4090 /* Put bitmap BG at base 1, leaving map-addressable space at base 0. */
4091 g_retroflat_state->px_id = bgInit( 2, BgType_Bmp16, BgSize_B16_256x256, 1, 0 );
4092 bgSetPriority( g_retroflat_state->px_id, 0 );
4093
4094 /* Setup the sprite engines. */
4095 oamInit( NDS_OAM_ACTIVE, SpriteMapping_1D_128, 0 );
4096
4097 /* Allocate sprite frame memory. */
4098 for( i = 0 ; NDS_SPRITES_ACTIVE > i ; i++ ) {
4099 g_retroflat_state->sprite_frames[i] = oamAllocateGfx(
4100 NDS_OAM_ACTIVE, SpriteSize_16x16, SpriteColorFormat_256Color );
4101 }
4102
4103# endif /* RETROFLAT_OPENGL */
4104
4105 /* Setup the timer. */
4106 TIMER0_CR = TIMER_ENABLE | TIMER_DIV_1024;
4107 TIMER1_CR = TIMER_ENABLE | TIMER_CASCADE;
4108
4109# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_GLUT )
4110
4111 /* == GLUT == */
4112
4113# define RETROFLAT_COLOR_TABLE_GLUT( idx, name_l, name_u, rd, gd, bd, cgac, cgad ) \
4114 g_retroflat_state->palette[idx] = RETROGLU_COLOR_ ## name_u;
4115 RETROFLAT_COLOR_TABLE( RETROFLAT_COLOR_TABLE_GLUT )
4116
4117 glutInit( &argc, argv );
4118 glut_init_flags = GLUT_DEPTH | GLUT_RGBA;
4119 if(
4120 RETROFLAT_FLAGS_UNLOCK_FPS != (RETROFLAT_FLAGS_UNLOCK_FPS & args->flags)
4121 ) {
4122 glut_init_flags |= GLUT_DOUBLE;
4123 }
4124 glutInitDisplayMode( glut_init_flags );
4125 if( 0 < args->screen_x || 0 < args->screen_y ) {
4126 glutInitWindowPosition( args->screen_x, args->screen_y );
4127 }
4128 /* TODO: Handle screen scaling? */
4129 glutInitWindowSize(
4130 g_retroflat_state->screen_w, g_retroflat_state->screen_h );
4131 glutCreateWindow( args->title );
4132 glutIdleFunc( retroflat_glut_idle );
4133 glutDisplayFunc( retroflat_glut_display );
4134 glutKeyboardFunc( retroflat_glut_key );
4135
4136 /* TODO: Handle mouse input in GLUT. */
4137
4138# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_PC_BIOS )
4139
4140 /* == DOS PC_BIOS == */
4141
4142 srand( time( NULL ) );
4143
4144 debug_printf( 3, "memory available before growth: %u", _memavl() );
4145# ifdef MAUG_DOS_MEM_L
4146 /* TODO: Should this check/init be in mmem.h instead? */
4147 _fheapgrow();
4148# else
4149 _nheapgrow();
4150# endif /* MAUG_DOS_MEM_L */
4151 debug_printf( 3, "memory available after growth: %u", _memavl() );
4152
4153 /* Setup timer handler. */
4154
4155 _disable();
4156
4157 /* Backup original handler for later. */
4158 segread( &s );
4159 r.h.al = 0x08;
4160 r.h.ah = 0x35;
4161 int86x( 0x21, &r, &r, &s );
4162 g_retroflat_state->old_timer_interrupt =
4163 (retroflat_intfunc)MK_FP( s.es, r.x.bx );
4164
4165 /* Install new interrupt handler. */
4166 g_ms = 0;
4167 r.h.al = 0x08;
4168 r.h.ah = 0x25;
4169 s.ds = FP_SEG( retroflat_timer_handler );
4170 r.x.dx = FP_OFF( retroflat_timer_handler );
4171 int86x( 0x21, &r, &r, &s );
4172
4173 /* Set resolution of timer chip to 1ms. */
4174 outp( 0x43, 0x36 );
4175 outp( 0x40, (uint8_t)(RETROFLAT_DOS_TIMER_DIV & 0xff) );
4176 outp( 0x40, (uint8_t)((RETROFLAT_DOS_TIMER_DIV >> 8) & 0xff) );
4177
4178 _enable();
4179
4180 debug_printf( 3, "timers initialized..." );
4181
4182 /* Setup graphics. */
4183
4184 memset( &r, 0, sizeof( r ) );
4185 r.x.ax = 0x0f00; /* Service: Get video mode. */
4186 int86( 0x10, &r, &r ); /* Call video interrupt. */
4187 g_retroflat_state->old_video_mode = r.h.al;
4188 debug_printf( 2, "saved old video mode: 0x%02x",
4189 g_retroflat_state->old_video_mode );
4190
4191 /* TODO: Put all screen mode dimensions in a LUT. */
4192 g_retroflat_state->screen_mode = args->screen_mode;
4193 switch( args->screen_mode ) {
4194 case RETROFLAT_SCREEN_MODE_CGA:
4195 debug_printf( 3, "using CGA 320x200x4 colors" );
4196 g_retroflat_state->screen_v_w = 320;
4197 g_retroflat_state->screen_v_h = 200;
4198 g_retroflat_state->screen_w = 320;
4199 g_retroflat_state->screen_h = 200;
4200 g_retroflat_state->buffer.px = (uint8_t SEG_FAR*)0xB8000000L;
4201 g_retroflat_state->buffer.w = 320;
4202 g_retroflat_state->buffer.h = 200;
4203 break;
4204
4205 case RETROFLAT_SCREEN_MODE_VGA:
4206 debug_printf( 3, "using VGA 320x200x16 colors" );
4207 g_retroflat_state->screen_v_w = 320;
4208 g_retroflat_state->screen_v_h = 200;
4209 g_retroflat_state->screen_w = 320;
4210 g_retroflat_state->screen_h = 200;
4211 g_retroflat_state->buffer.px = (uint8_t SEG_FAR*)0xA0000000L;
4212 g_retroflat_state->buffer.w = 320;
4213 g_retroflat_state->buffer.h = 200;
4214 g_retroflat_state->buffer.sz = 320 * 200;
4215 break;
4216
4217 default:
4218 error_printf( "unsupported video mode: %d", args->screen_mode );
4219 retval = MERROR_GUI;
4220 goto cleanup;
4221 }
4222
4223 memset( &r, 0, sizeof( r ) );
4224 r.h.al = args->screen_mode;
4225 int86( 0x10, &r, &r ); /* Call video interrupt. */
4226
4227 debug_printf(
4228 3, "graphics initialized (mode 0x%02x)...", args->screen_mode );
4229
4230 /* Initialize color table. */
4231# define RETROFLAT_COLOR_TABLE_CGA_COLORS_INIT( idx, name_l, name_u, r, g, b, cgac, cgad ) \
4232 g_retroflat_state->cga_color_table[idx] = RETROFLAT_CGA_COLOR_ ## cgac;
4233 RETROFLAT_COLOR_TABLE( RETROFLAT_COLOR_TABLE_CGA_COLORS_INIT )
4234
4235 /* Initialize dither table. */
4236# define RETROFLAT_COLOR_TABLE_CGA_DITHER_INIT( idx, name_l, name_u, r, g, b, cgac, cgad ) \
4237 g_retroflat_state->cga_dither_table[idx] = RETROFLAT_CGA_COLOR_ ## cgad;
4238 RETROFLAT_COLOR_TABLE( RETROFLAT_COLOR_TABLE_CGA_DITHER_INIT )
4239
4240# else
4241# pragma message( "warning: init not implemented" )
4242# endif /* RETROFLAT_API_ALLEGRO */
4243
4244# if defined( RETROFLAT_SOFT_SHAPES ) || defined( RETROFLAT_SOFT_LINES )
4245 retval = retrosoft_init();
4246 maug_cleanup_if_not_ok();
4247# endif /* RETROFLAT_SOFT_SHAPES || RETROFLAT_SOFT_LINES */
4248
4249# if defined( RETROFLAT_OPENGL )
4250 retval = retrosoft_init();
4251 maug_cleanup_if_not_ok();
4252 retval = retroglu_init_glyph_tex();
4253 maug_cleanup_if_not_ok();
4254# endif /* RETROFLAT_OPENGL */
4255
4256# ifdef RETROFLAT_VDP
4257# if defined( RETROFLAT_OS_UNIX )
4258 g_retroflat_state->vdp_exe = dlopen(
4259# ifdef RETROFLAT_API_SDL1
4260 "./rvdpsdl1.so",
4261# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_SDL2 )
4262 "./rvdpsdl2.so",
4263# else
4264# error "rvdp .so undefined!"
4265# endif
4266 RTLD_LAZY );
4267# elif defined( RETROFLAT_OS_WIN )
4268 g_retroflat_state->vdp_exe = LoadLibrary(
4269# ifdef RETROFLAT_API_SDL1
4270 "./rvdpsdl1.dll"
4271# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_SDL2 )
4272 "./rvdpsdl2.dll"
4273# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_WIN32 )
4274 "./rvdpnt.dll"
4275# else
4276# error "rvdp .so undefined!"
4277# endif
4278 );
4279# else
4280# error "dlopen undefined!"
4281# endif /* RETROFLAT_OS_UNIX */
4282
4283 if( !(g_retroflat_state->vdp_exe) ) {
4284 error_printf( "not loading VDP" );
4285 /* Skip creating the buffer or trying to run the init proc. */
4286 goto skip_vdp;
4287 }
4288
4289 /* Create intermediary screen buffer. */
4290 debug_printf( 1, "creating VDP buffer, %d x %d",
4291 g_retroflat_state->screen_v_w, g_retroflat_state->screen_v_h );
4292 g_retroflat_state->vdp_buffer =
4293 calloc( 1, sizeof( struct RETROFLAT_BITMAP ) );
4294 maug_cleanup_if_null_alloc(
4295 struct RETROFLAT_BITMAP*, g_retroflat_state->vdp_buffer );
4296 retval = retroflat_create_bitmap(
4297 g_retroflat_state->screen_v_w, g_retroflat_state->screen_v_h,
4298 g_retroflat_state->vdp_buffer, RETROFLAT_FLAGS_OPAQUE );
4299 maug_cleanup_if_not_ok();
4300
4301 debug_printf( 1, "initializing VDP..." );
4302 retval = retroflat_vdp_call( "retroflat_vdp_init" );
4303
4304skip_vdp:
4305
4306# endif /* RETROFLAT_VDP */
4307
4308# ifndef RETROFLAT_NO_BLANK_INIT
4309 retroflat_draw_lock( NULL );
4310 retroflat_rect(
4311 NULL, RETROFLAT_COLOR_BLACK, 0, 0,
4312 retroflat_screen_w(), retroflat_screen_h(),
4313 RETROFLAT_FLAGS_FILL );
4314 retroflat_draw_release( NULL );
4315# endif /* !RETROFLAT_NO_BLANK_INIT */
4316
4317cleanup:
4318
4319 return retval;
4320}
4321
4322/* === */
4323
4324void retroflat_shutdown( int retval ) {
4325
4326# if defined( RETROFLAT_API_PC_BIOS )
4327 union REGS r;
4328 struct SREGS s;
4329# endif /* RETROFLAT_API_PC_BIOS */
4330
4331 debug_printf( 1, "retroflat shutdown called..." );
4332
4333# if defined( RETROFLAT_VDP )
4334 if( NULL != g_retroflat_state->vdp_exe ) {
4335 retroflat_vdp_call( "retroflat_vdp_shutdown" );
4336# ifdef RETROFLAT_OS_UNIX
4337 dlclose( g_retroflat_state->vdp_exe );
4338# elif defined( RETROFLAT_OS_WIN )
4339 FreeLibrary( g_retroflat_state->vdp_exe );
4340# else
4341# error "dlclose undefined!"
4342# endif /* RETROFLAT_OS_UNIX || RETROFLAT_OS_WIN */
4343 }
4344
4345 if( NULL != g_retroflat_state->vdp_buffer ) {
4346 debug_printf( 1, "destroying VPD buffer..." );
4347 retroflat_destroy_bitmap( g_retroflat_state->vdp_buffer );
4348 free( g_retroflat_state->vdp_buffer );
4349 }
4350# endif /* RETROFLAT_VDP */
4351
4352# if defined( RETROFLAT_SOFT_SHAPES ) || defined( RETROFLAT_SOFT_LINES ) || \
4353defined( RETROFLAT_OPENGL )
4354 debug_printf( 1, "calling retrosoft shutdown..." );
4355 retrosoft_shutdown();
4356# endif /* RETROFLAT_SOFT_SHAPES */
4357
4358# ifdef RETROFLAT_OPENGL
4359 debug_printf( 1, "destroying GL glyphs..." );
4360 retroglu_destroy_glyph_tex();
4361# endif /* RETROFLAT_OPENGL */
4362
4363 /* === Platform-Specific Shutdown === */
4364
4365# if defined( RETROFLAT_OS_WASM )
4366 /* Do nothing, start the main loop later. */
4367 return;
4368
4369# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_ALLEGRO )
4370
4371 /* == Allegro == */
4372
4373 if( RETROFLAT_ERROR_ENGINE != retval ) {
4374 clear_keybuf();
4375 }
4376
4377 retroflat_destroy_bitmap( &(g_retroflat_state->buffer) );
4378
4379# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_SDL1 ) || defined( RETROFLAT_API_SDL2 )
4380
4381 /* == SDL == */
4382
4383# ifndef RETROFLAT_API_SDL1
4384 SDL_DestroyWindow( g_retroflat_state->window );
4385# endif /* !RETROFLAT_API_SDL1 */
4386
4387 SDL_Quit();
4388
4389# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_WIN16 ) || defined( RETROFLAT_API_WIN32 )
4390
4391 /* TODO: Windows shutdown? */
4392
4393 /* Stop frame timer if available. */
4394 if( NULL != g_retroflat_state->frame_iter ) {
4395 KillTimer( g_retroflat_state->window, RETROFLAT_WIN_FRAME_TIMER_ID );
4396 }
4397
4398 /* Stop loop timer if available. */
4399 if( NULL != g_retroflat_state->loop_iter ) {
4400 KillTimer( g_retroflat_state->window, RETROFLAT_WIN_LOOP_TIMER_ID );
4401 }
4402
4403 if( (HDC)NULL != g_retroflat_state->buffer.hdc_b ) {
4404 /* Return the default object into the HDC. */
4405 SelectObject(
4406 g_retroflat_state->buffer.hdc_b,
4407 g_retroflat_state->buffer.old_hbm_b );
4408 DeleteDC( g_retroflat_state->buffer.hdc_b );
4409 g_retroflat_state->buffer.hdc_b = (HDC)NULL;
4410
4411 /* Destroy buffer bitmap! */
4412 retroflat_destroy_bitmap( &(g_retroflat_state->buffer) );
4413 }
4414
4415# ifndef RETROFLAT_OPENGL
4416 RETROFLAT_COLOR_TABLE( RETROFLAT_COLOR_TABLE_WIN_BRRM )
4417 RETROFLAT_COLOR_TABLE( RETROFLAT_COLOR_TABLE_WIN_PENRM )
4418# endif /* !RETROFLAT_OPENGL */
4419
4420# ifdef RETROFLAT_WING
4421 if( (HMODULE)NULL != g_w.module ) {
4422 FreeLibrary( g_w.module );
4423 }
4424# endif /* RETROFLAT_WING */
4425
4426 if( (HDC)NULL != g_retroflat_state->hdc_win ) {
4427 ReleaseDC( g_retroflat_state->window, g_retroflat_state->hdc_win );
4428 }
4429
4430# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_GLUT )
4431
4432 /* TODO */
4433
4434# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_PC_BIOS )
4435
4436 if( 0 != g_retroflat_state->old_video_mode ) {
4437 /* Restore old video mode. */
4438 debug_printf( 3, "restoring video mode 0x%02x...",
4439 g_retroflat_state->old_video_mode );
4440
4441 memset( &r, 0, sizeof( r ) );
4442 r.x.ax = g_retroflat_state->old_video_mode;
4443 int86( 0x10, &r, &r ); /* Call video interrupt. */
4444 }
4445
4446 if( NULL != g_retroflat_state->old_timer_interrupt ) {
4447 /* Re-install original interrupt handler. */
4448 debug_printf( 3, "restoring timer interrupt..." );
4449 _disable();
4450 segread( &s );
4451 r.h.al = 0x08;
4452 r.h.ah = 0x25;
4453 s.ds = FP_SEG( g_retroflat_state->old_timer_interrupt );
4454 r.x.dx = FP_OFF( g_retroflat_state->old_timer_interrupt );
4455 int86x( 0x21, &r, &r, &s );
4456 }
4457
4458 /* Reset timer chip resolution to 18.2...ms. */
4459 outp( 0x43, 0x36 );
4460 outp( 0x40, 0x00 );
4461 outp( 0x40, 0x00 );
4462
4463 _enable();
4464
4465# else
4466# pragma message( "warning: shutdown not implemented" )
4467# endif /* RETROFLAT_API_ALLEGRO || RETROFLAT_API_SDL2 */
4468
4469 maug_munlock( g_retroflat_state_h, g_retroflat_state );
4470 maug_mfree( g_retroflat_state );
4471
4472}
4473
4474/* === */
4475
4476# ifdef RETROFLAT_VDP
4477
4478MERROR_RETVAL retroflat_vdp_call( const char* proc_name ) {
4479 MERROR_RETVAL retval = MERROR_OK;
4480 retroflat_vdp_proc_t vdp_proc = (retroflat_vdp_proc_t)NULL;
4481# ifdef RETROFLAT_OS_WIN
4482 char proc_name_ex[256];
4483# endif /* RETROFLAT_OS_WIN */
4484
4485 if( NULL == g_retroflat_state->vdp_exe ) {
4486 goto cleanup;
4487 }
4488
4489# ifdef RETROFLAT_OS_UNIX
4490 vdp_proc = dlsym( g_retroflat_state->vdp_exe, proc_name );
4491# elif defined( RETROFLAT_OS_WIN )
4492 /* Append a _ to the proc_name because Watcom? Windows? */
4493 maug_snprintf( proc_name_ex, 255, "%s_", proc_name );
4494 vdp_proc = (retroflat_vdp_proc_t)GetProcAddress(
4495 g_retroflat_state->vdp_exe, proc_name_ex );
4496# else
4497# error "dlsym undefined!"
4498# endif
4499 if( (retroflat_vdp_proc_t)NULL == vdp_proc ) {
4500 goto cleanup;
4501 }
4502
4503# ifdef RETROFLAT_OS_WIN
4504 retroflat_draw_lock( g_retroflat_state->vdp_buffer );
4505# endif /* RETROFLAT_OS_WIN */
4506
4507 if(
4508 /* Don't pxlock before init can set the flag! */
4509 0 == strcmp( "retroflat_vdp_flip", proc_name ) &&
4510 RETROFLAT_VDP_FLAG_PXLOCK ==
4511 (RETROFLAT_VDP_FLAG_PXLOCK & g_retroflat_state->vdp_flags)
4512 ) {
4513 retroflat_vdp_lock( &(g_retroflat_state->buffer) );
4514 retroflat_vdp_lock( g_retroflat_state->vdp_buffer );
4515 }
4516
4517 retval = vdp_proc( g_retroflat_state );
4518
4519 if(
4520 0 == strcmp( "retroflat_vdp_flip", proc_name ) &&
4521 RETROFLAT_VDP_FLAG_PXLOCK ==
4522 (RETROFLAT_VDP_FLAG_PXLOCK & g_retroflat_state->vdp_flags)
4523 ) {
4524 retroflat_vdp_release( &(g_retroflat_state->buffer) );
4525 retroflat_vdp_release( g_retroflat_state->vdp_buffer );
4526 }
4527
4528# ifdef RETROFLAT_OS_WIN
4529 retroflat_draw_release( g_retroflat_state->vdp_buffer );
4530# endif /* RETROFLAT_OS_WIN */
4531
4532cleanup:
4533 return retval;
4534}
4535
4536# endif /* RETROFLAT_VDP */
4537
4538/* === */
4539
4540void retroflat_set_title( const char* format, ... ) {
4541 char title[RETROFLAT_TITLE_MAX + 1];
4542 va_list vargs;
4543
4544 /* Build the title. */
4545 va_start( vargs, format );
4546 memset( title, '\0', RETROFLAT_TITLE_MAX + 1 );
4547 maug_vsnprintf( title, RETROFLAT_TITLE_MAX, format, vargs );
4548
4549#if defined( RETROFLAT_API_ALLEGRO )
4550 set_window_title( title );
4551#elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_SDL1 )
4552 SDL_WM_SetCaption( title, NULL );
4553#elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_SDL2 )
4554 SDL_SetWindowTitle( g_retroflat_state->window, title );
4555#elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_WIN16 ) || defined( RETROFLAT_API_WIN32 )
4556 SetWindowText( g_retroflat_state->window, title );
4557#elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_LIBNDS )
4558 /* Do nothing. */
4559#elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_GLUT )
4560 glutSetWindowTitle( title );
4561#else
4562# pragma message( "warning: set title implemented" )
4563# endif /* RETROFLAT_API_ALLEGRO || RETROFLAT_API_SDL */
4564
4565 va_end( vargs );
4566}
4567
4568/* === */
4569
4570retroflat_ms_t retroflat_get_ms() {
4571# if defined( RETROFLAT_API_ALLEGRO )
4572
4573 /* == Allegro == */
4574
4575 return g_ms;
4576
4577# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_SDL1 ) || defined( RETROFLAT_API_SDL2 )
4578
4579 /* == SDL == */
4580
4581 return SDL_GetTicks();
4582
4583# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_WIN16 ) || defined( RETROFLAT_API_WIN32 )
4584
4585 return timeGetTime();
4586
4587# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_LIBNDS )
4588
4589 /* == libNDS == */
4590
4591 return ((TIMER1_DATA * (1 << 16)) + TIMER0_DATA) / 32;
4592
4593# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_GLUT )
4594
4595 /* == GLUT == */
4596
4597 return glutGet( GLUT_ELAPSED_TIME );
4598
4599# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_PC_BIOS )
4600
4601 return g_ms;
4602
4603# else
4604# pragma message( "warning: get_ms not implemented" )
4605# endif /* RETROFLAT_API_* */
4606}
4607
4608/* === */
4609
4610uint32_t retroflat_get_rand() {
4611 return rand();
4612}
4613
4614/* === */
4615
4616int retroflat_draw_lock( struct RETROFLAT_BITMAP* bmp ) {
4617 int retval = RETROFLAT_OK;
4618
4619# if defined( RETROFLAT_OPENGL )
4620
4621 if(
4622 NULL != bmp &&
4623 &(g_retroflat_state->buffer) != bmp &&
4624 (MAUG_MHANDLE)NULL != bmp->tex.bytes_h
4625 ) {
4626 bmp->flags |= RETROFLAT_FLAGS_LOCK;
4627 maug_mlock( bmp->tex.bytes_h, bmp->tex.bytes );
4628 }
4629
4630# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_ALLEGRO )
4631
4632 /* == Allegro == */
4633
4634 if( NULL != bmp ) {
4635 /* Normal bitmaps don't need to be locked in allegro. */
4636 goto cleanup;
4637 }
4638
4639 /* Lock screen for drawing if bmp is NULL. */
4640
4641# ifdef RETROFLAT_MOUSE
4642 /* XXX: Broken in DOS. */
4643 show_mouse( NULL ); /* Disable mouse before drawing. */
4644# endif
4645 acquire_screen();
4646
4647cleanup:
4648
4649# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_SDL1 )
4650
4651 /* == SDL1 == */
4652
4653 /* SDL locking semantics are the opposite of every other platform. See
4654 * retroflat_px_lock() for a proxy to SDL_LockSurface().
4655 */
4656
4657 if( NULL == bmp || &(g_retroflat_state->buffer) == bmp ) {
4658 /* Special case: Attempting to lock the screen. */
4659 bmp = &(g_retroflat_state->buffer);
4660
4661 if(
4662 RETROFLAT_FLAGS_SCREEN_LOCK !=
4663 (RETROFLAT_FLAGS_SCREEN_LOCK & bmp->flags)
4664 ) {
4665 /* Do a perfunctory "screen lock" since programs are supposed to
4666 * lock the screen before doing any drawing.
4667 */
4668 bmp->flags |= RETROFLAT_FLAGS_SCREEN_LOCK;
4669
4670 } else {
4671 /* We actually want to lock the buffer for pixel manipulation. */
4672 assert( 0 == (RETROFLAT_FLAGS_LOCK & bmp->flags) );
4673 bmp->flags |= RETROFLAT_FLAGS_LOCK;
4674 }
4675
4676 } else {
4677 /* Locking a bitmap for pixel drawing. */
4678 assert( 0 == (RETROFLAT_FLAGS_LOCK & bmp->flags) );
4679 bmp->flags |= RETROFLAT_FLAGS_LOCK;
4680 }
4681
4682# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_SDL2 )
4683
4684 /* == SDL2 == */
4685
4686 if(
4687 NULL == bmp
4688# ifdef RETROFLAT_VDP
4689 && NULL == g_retroflat_state->vdp_buffer
4690# endif /* RETROFLAT_VDP */
4691 ) {
4692
4693 /* Target is the screen buffer. */
4694 SDL_SetRenderTarget(
4695 g_retroflat_state->buffer.renderer,
4696 g_retroflat_state->buffer.texture );
4697
4698 goto cleanup;
4699
4700# ifdef RETROFLAT_VDP
4701 } else if( NULL == bmp && NULL != g_retroflat_state->vdp_buffer ) {
4702 /* Lock the VDP buffer for drawing. */
4703 bmp = g_retroflat_state->vdp_buffer;
4704# endif /* RETROFLAT_VDP */
4705 }
4706
4707 assert( NULL == bmp->renderer );
4708 assert( NULL != bmp->surface );
4709 bmp->renderer = SDL_CreateSoftwareRenderer( bmp->surface );
4710
4711cleanup:
4712
4713# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_WIN16 ) || defined( RETROFLAT_API_WIN32 )
4714
4715 /* == Win16/Win32 == */
4716
4717 if( NULL == bmp ) {
4718# ifdef RETROFLAT_VDP
4719 if( NULL != g_retroflat_state->vdp_buffer ) {
4720 bmp = g_retroflat_state->vdp_buffer;
4721 } else {
4722# endif
4723
4724 /* TODO: Reconcile with VDP! */
4725 /* The HDC should be created already by WndProc. */
4726 assert( (HDC)NULL != g_retroflat_state->buffer.hdc_b );
4727 goto cleanup;
4728
4729# ifdef RETROFLAT_VDP
4730 }
4731# endif /* RETROFLAT_VDP */
4732 }
4733
4734 /* Sanity check. */
4735 assert( (HBITMAP)NULL != bmp->b );
4736 assert( (HDC)NULL == bmp->hdc_b );
4737
4738 /* Create HDC for source bitmap compatible with the buffer. */
4739 bmp->hdc_b = CreateCompatibleDC( (HDC)NULL );
4740 maug_cleanup_if_null( HDC, bmp->hdc_b, RETROFLAT_ERROR_BITMAP );
4741
4742 if( (HBITMAP)NULL != bmp->mask ) {
4743 /* Create HDC for source mask compatible with the buffer. */
4744 bmp->hdc_mask = CreateCompatibleDC( (HDC)NULL );
4745 maug_cleanup_if_null( HDC, bmp->hdc_mask, RETROFLAT_ERROR_BITMAP );
4746 }
4747
4748 /* Select bitmaps into their HDCs. */
4749 bmp->old_hbm_b = SelectObject( bmp->hdc_b, bmp->b );
4750 if( (HBITMAP)NULL != bmp->mask ) {
4751 bmp->old_hbm_mask = SelectObject( bmp->hdc_mask, bmp->mask );
4752 }
4753
4754cleanup:
4755
4756# else
4757# pragma message( "warning: draw lock not implemented" )
4758# endif /* RETROFLAT_API_ALLEGRO */
4759
4760 return retval;
4761}
4762
4763/* === */
4764
4765MERROR_RETVAL retroflat_draw_release( struct RETROFLAT_BITMAP* bmp ) {
4766 MERROR_RETVAL retval = MERROR_OK;
4767
4768# ifdef RETROFLAT_OPENGL
4769 if( NULL == bmp || &(g_retroflat_state->buffer) == bmp ) {
4770 /* Flush GL buffer and swap screen buffers. */
4771 glFlush();
4772
4773# if defined( RETROFLAT_API_SDL1 ) || defined( RETROFLAT_API_SDL2 )
4774 SDL_GL_SwapBuffers();
4775# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_WIN16 ) || defined( RETROFLAT_API_WIN32 )
4776 SwapBuffers( g_retroflat_state->hdc_win );
4777# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_GLUT )
4778 glutSwapBuffers();
4779# endif
4780 } else if( retroflat_bitmap_locked( bmp ) ) {
4781 bmp->flags &= ~RETROFLAT_FLAGS_LOCK;
4782#ifndef RETROGLU_NO_TEXTURES
4783 assert( 0 < bmp->tex.id );
4784 assert( NULL != bmp->tex.bytes );
4785
4786 /* Update stored texture if it exists. */
4787 glBindTexture( GL_TEXTURE_2D, bmp->tex.id );
4788 glTexImage2D( GL_TEXTURE_2D, 0, GL_RGBA, bmp->tex.w, bmp->tex.h, 0,
4789 GL_RGBA, GL_UNSIGNED_BYTE, bmp->tex.bytes );
4790 glBindTexture( GL_TEXTURE_2D, 0 );
4791#endif /* !RETROGLU_NO_TEXTURES */
4792
4793 /* Unlock texture bitmap. */
4794 maug_munlock( bmp->tex.bytes_h, bmp->tex.bytes );
4795 }
4796
4797# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_ALLEGRO )
4798
4799 /* == Allegro == */
4800
4801 if( NULL != bmp ) {
4802 /* Don't need to lock bitmaps in Allegro. */
4803 goto cleanup;
4804 }
4805
4806 /* Flip the buffer. */
4807 blit( g_retroflat_state->buffer.b, screen, 0, 0, 0, 0, SCREEN_W, SCREEN_H );
4808
4809 /* Release the screen. */
4810 release_screen();
4811# ifdef RETROFLAT_MOUSE
4812 /* XXX: Broken in DOS. */
4813 show_mouse( screen ); /* Enable mouse after drawing. */
4814# endif /* RETROFLAT_MOUSE */
4815 vsync();
4816
4817cleanup:
4818# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_SDL1 )
4819
4820 /* == SDL1 == */
4821
4822 if( NULL == bmp || &(g_retroflat_state->buffer) == bmp ) {
4823 /* Special case: Attempting to release the (real, non-VDP) screen. */
4824 bmp = &(g_retroflat_state->buffer);
4825
4826 if(
4827 RETROFLAT_FLAGS_LOCK == (RETROFLAT_FLAGS_LOCK & bmp->flags)
4828 ) {
4829 /* The screen was locked for pixel manipulation. */
4830 bmp->flags &= ~RETROFLAT_FLAGS_LOCK;
4831 SDL_UnlockSurface( bmp->surface );
4832
4833 } else {
4834 assert(
4835 RETROFLAT_FLAGS_SCREEN_LOCK ==
4836 (RETROFLAT_FLAGS_SCREEN_LOCK & bmp->flags) );
4837 bmp->flags &= ~RETROFLAT_FLAGS_SCREEN_LOCK;
4838
4839# if defined( RETROFLAT_VDP )
4840 retroflat_vdp_call( "retroflat_vdp_flip" );
4841# endif /* RETROFLAT_VDP */
4842
4843 SDL_Flip( bmp->surface );
4844 }
4845
4846 } else {
4847 /* Releasing a bitmap. */
4848 assert( RETROFLAT_FLAGS_LOCK == (RETROFLAT_FLAGS_LOCK & bmp->flags) );
4849 bmp->flags &= ~RETROFLAT_FLAGS_LOCK;
4850 SDL_UnlockSurface( bmp->surface );
4851 }
4852
4853# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_SDL2 )
4854
4855 /* == SDL2 == */
4856
4857 if(
4858 NULL == bmp
4859# ifdef RETROFLAT_VDP
4860 && NULL == g_retroflat_state->vdp_buffer
4861# endif /* RETROFLAT_VDP */
4862 ) {
4863 /* Flip the screen. */
4864 SDL_SetRenderTarget( g_retroflat_state->buffer.renderer, NULL );
4865 SDL_RenderCopyEx(
4866 g_retroflat_state->buffer.renderer,
4867 g_retroflat_state->buffer.texture, NULL, NULL, 0, NULL, 0 );
4868 SDL_RenderPresent( g_retroflat_state->buffer.renderer );
4869
4870 goto cleanup;
4871
4872# ifdef RETROFLAT_VDP
4873 } else if( NULL == bmp && NULL != g_retroflat_state->vdp_buffer ) {
4874 bmp = g_retroflat_state->vdp_buffer;
4875# endif /* RETROFLAT_VDP */
4876 }
4877
4878 /* It's a bitmap. */
4879
4880 /* Scrap the software renderer. */
4881 SDL_RenderPresent( bmp->renderer );
4882 SDL_DestroyRenderer( bmp->renderer );
4883 bmp->renderer = NULL;
4884
4885 /* Scrap the old texture and recreate it from the updated surface. */
4886 /* The renderer should be a software renderer pointing to the surface,
4887 * created in retroflat_lock() above.
4888 */
4889 assert( NULL != bmp->texture );
4890 SDL_DestroyTexture( bmp->texture );
4891 bmp->texture = SDL_CreateTextureFromSurface(
4892 g_retroflat_state->buffer.renderer, bmp->surface );
4893 maug_cleanup_if_null(
4894 SDL_Texture*, bmp->texture, RETROFLAT_ERROR_BITMAP );
4895
4896cleanup:
4897# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_WIN16 ) || defined( RETROFLAT_API_WIN32 )
4898
4899 /* == Win16/Win32 == */
4900
4901 if( NULL == bmp ) {
4902 /* Trigger a screen refresh if this was a screen lock. */
4903 if( (HWND)NULL != g_retroflat_state->window ) {
4904 InvalidateRect( g_retroflat_state->window, 0, TRUE );
4905 }
4906
4907# ifdef RETROFLAT_VDP
4908 if( NULL != g_retroflat_state->vdp_buffer ) {
4909 bmp = g_retroflat_state->vdp_buffer;
4910 } else {
4911# endif
4912
4913 /* TODO: Reconcile with VDP! */
4914 goto cleanup;
4915
4916# ifdef RETROFLAT_VDP
4917 }
4918# endif
4919 }
4920
4921 /* Unlock the bitmap. */
4922 if( (HDC)NULL != bmp->hdc_b ) {
4923 SelectObject( bmp->hdc_b, bmp->old_hbm_b );
4924 DeleteDC( bmp->hdc_b );
4925 bmp->hdc_b = (HDC)NULL;
4926 bmp->old_hbm_b = (HBITMAP)NULL;
4927 }
4928
4929 /* Unlock the mask. */
4930 if( (HDC)NULL != bmp->hdc_mask ) {
4931 SelectObject( bmp->hdc_mask, bmp->old_hbm_mask );
4932 DeleteDC( bmp->hdc_mask );
4933 bmp->hdc_mask = (HDC)NULL;
4934 bmp->old_hbm_mask = (HBITMAP)NULL;
4935 }
4936
4937cleanup:
4938
4939# else
4940# pragma message( "warning: draw release not implemented" )
4941# endif /* RETROFLAT_API_ALLEGRO */
4942
4943 return retval;
4944}
4945
4946/* === */
4947
4948# if (defined( RETROFLAT_API_WIN16 ) || \
4949 defined (RETROFLAT_API_WIN32 )) && \
4950 !defined( RETROFLAT_OPENGL )
4951
4952static int retroflat_bitmap_win_transparency(
4953 struct RETROFLAT_BITMAP* bmp_out, int16_t w, int16_t h
4954) {
4955 int retval = RETROFLAT_OK;
4956 unsigned long txp_color = 0;
4957
4958 /* Setup bitmap transparency mask. */
4959 bmp_out->mask = CreateBitmap( w, h, 1, 1, NULL );
4960 maug_cleanup_if_null( HBITMAP, bmp_out->mask, RETROFLAT_ERROR_BITMAP );
4961
4962 retval = retroflat_draw_lock( bmp_out );
4963 maug_cleanup_if_not_ok();
4964
4965 /* Convert the color key into bitmap format. */
4966 txp_color |= (RETROFLAT_TXP_B & 0xff);
4967 txp_color <<= 8;
4968 txp_color |= (RETROFLAT_TXP_G & 0xff);
4969 txp_color <<= 8;
4970 txp_color |= (RETROFLAT_TXP_R & 0xff);
4971 SetBkColor( bmp_out->hdc_b, txp_color );
4972
4973 /* Create the mask from the color key. */
4974 BitBlt(
4975 bmp_out->hdc_mask, 0, 0, w, h, bmp_out->hdc_b, 0, 0, SRCCOPY );
4976 BitBlt(
4977 bmp_out->hdc_b, 0, 0, w, h, bmp_out->hdc_mask, 0, 0, SRCINVERT );
4978
4979cleanup:
4980
4981 if( RETROFLAT_OK == retval ) {
4982 retroflat_draw_release( bmp_out );
4983 }
4984
4985 return retval;
4986}
4987
4988# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_PC_BIOS )
4989
4990static MERROR_RETVAL retroflat_bitmap_dos_transparency(
4991 struct RETROFLAT_BITMAP* bmp_out
4992) {
4993 MERROR_RETVAL retval = MERROR_OK;
4994 size_t i = 0;
4995
4996 switch( g_retroflat_state->screen_mode ) {
4997 case RETROFLAT_SCREEN_MODE_VGA:
4998
4999 debug_printf( RETROFLAT_BITMAP_TRACE_LVL,
5000 "creating transparency mask for bitmap..." );
5001
5002 /* Create a transparency mask based on palette 0. */
5003 bmp_out->mask = _fcalloc( bmp_out->w, bmp_out->h );
5004 maug_cleanup_if_null_alloc( uint8_t*, bmp_out->mask );
5005 /* XXX: Wrong sz field! */
5006 for( i = 0 ; bmp_out->sz > i ; i++ ) {
5007 if( RETROFLAT_TXP_PAL_IDX == bmp_out->px[i] ) {
5008 bmp_out->mask[i] = 0xff;
5009 } else {
5010 bmp_out->mask[i] = 0x00;
5011 }
5012 }
5013 break;
5014 }
5015
5016cleanup:
5017 return retval;
5018}
5019
5020# endif /* RETROFLAT_API_WIN16 ||
5021 RETROFLAT_API_WIN32 ||
5022 RETROFLAT_API_PC_BIOS */
5023
5024MERROR_RETVAL retroflat_load_bitmap(
5025 const char* filename, struct RETROFLAT_BITMAP* bmp_out, uint8_t flags
5026) {
5027 char filename_path[RETROFLAT_PATH_MAX + 1];
5028 int retval = MERROR_OK;
5029# if defined( RETROFLAT_OPENGL )
5030 mfile_t bmp_file;
5031 struct MFMT_STRUCT_BMPFILE header_bmp;
5032 MAUG_MHANDLE bmp_palette_h = (MAUG_MHANDLE)NULL;
5033 uint32_t bmp_color = 0;
5034 uint32_t* bmp_palette = NULL;
5035 MAUG_MHANDLE bmp_px_h = (MAUG_MHANDLE)NULL;
5036 uint8_t* bmp_px = NULL;
5037 off_t bmp_px_sz = 0;
5038 uint8_t bmp_r = 0,
5039 bmp_g = 0,
5040 bmp_b = 0,
5041 bmp_color_idx = 0,
5042 bmp_flags = 0;
5043 off_t i = 0;
5044# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_SDL1 )
5045 SDL_Surface* tmp_surface = NULL;
5046# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_WIN16 ) || defined (RETROFLAT_API_WIN32 )
5047# if defined( RETROFLAT_API_WIN16 )
5048 char* buf = NULL;
5049 mfile_t bmp_file;
5050 long int i, x, y, w, h, colors, offset, sz, read;
5051# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_WIN32 )
5052 BITMAP bm;
5053# endif /* RETROFLAT_API_WIN32 */
5054# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_PC_BIOS )
5055 mfile_t bmp_file;
5056 struct MFMT_STRUCT_BMPFILE header_bmp;
5057 MAUG_MHANDLE bmp_palette_h = (MAUG_MHANDLE)NULL;
5058 uint32_t bmp_color = 0;
5059 uint8_t bmp_flags = 0;
5060 off_t bmp_px_sz = 0;
5061 off_t i = 0;
5062
5063# endif /* RETROFLAT_API_WIN16 || RETROFLAT_API_WIN32 */
5064
5065 assert( NULL != bmp_out );
5066
5067 maug_mzero( bmp_out, sizeof( struct RETROFLAT_BITMAP ) );
5068
5069 /* Build the path to the bitmap. */
5070 memset( filename_path, '\0', RETROFLAT_PATH_MAX + 1 );
5071 if(
5072 RETROFLAT_FLAGS_LITERAL_PATH ==
5073 (RETROFLAT_FLAGS_LITERAL_PATH & flags)
5074 ) {
5075 maug_snprintf( filename_path, RETROFLAT_PATH_MAX, "%s", filename );
5076 } else {
5077 maug_snprintf( filename_path, RETROFLAT_PATH_MAX, "%s%c%s.%s",
5078 g_retroflat_state->assets_path, RETROFLAT_PATH_SEP,
5079 filename, RETROFLAT_BITMAP_EXT );
5080 }
5081
5082 debug_printf( 1, "retroflat: loading bitmap: %s", filename_path );
5083
5084# ifdef RETROFLAT_OPENGL
5085
5086 retval = mfile_open_read( filename_path, &bmp_file );
5087 maug_cleanup_if_not_ok();
5088
5089 /* TODO: mfmt file detection system. */
5090 header_bmp.magic[0] = 'B';
5091 header_bmp.magic[1] = 'M';
5092 header_bmp.info.sz = 40;
5093
5094 retval = mfmt_read_bmp_header(
5095 (struct MFMT_STRUCT*)&header_bmp,
5096 &bmp_file, 0, mfile_get_sz( &bmp_file ), &bmp_flags );
5097 maug_cleanup_if_not_ok();
5098
5099 assert( 0 < mfile_get_sz( &bmp_file ) );
5100
5101 /* Setup bitmap options from header. */
5102 bmp_out->tex.w = header_bmp.info.width;
5103 bmp_out->tex.h = header_bmp.info.height;
5104 bmp_out->tex.sz = bmp_out->tex.w * bmp_out->tex.h * 4;
5105 bmp_out->tex.bpp = 24;
5106
5107 /* Allocate a space for the bitmap palette. */
5108 bmp_palette_h = maug_malloc( 4, header_bmp.info.palette_ncolors );
5109 maug_cleanup_if_null_alloc( MAUG_MHANDLE, bmp_palette_h );
5110
5111 maug_mlock( bmp_palette_h, bmp_palette );
5112 maug_cleanup_if_null_alloc( uint32_t*, bmp_palette );
5113
5114 retval = mfmt_read_bmp_palette(
5115 (struct MFMT_STRUCT*)&header_bmp,
5116 bmp_palette, 4 * header_bmp.info.palette_ncolors,
5117 &bmp_file, 54 /* TODO */, mfile_get_sz( &bmp_file ) - 54, bmp_flags );
5118 maug_cleanup_if_not_ok();
5119
5120 /* Allocate a space for the bitmap pixels. */
5121 bmp_px_sz = header_bmp.info.width * header_bmp.info.height;
5122 bmp_px_h = maug_malloc( 1, bmp_px_sz );
5123 maug_cleanup_if_null_alloc( MAUG_MHANDLE, bmp_px_h );
5124
5125 maug_mlock( bmp_px_h, bmp_px );
5126 maug_cleanup_if_null_alloc( uint8_t*, bmp_px );
5127
5128 retval = mfmt_read_bmp_px(
5129 (struct MFMT_STRUCT*)&header_bmp,
5130 bmp_px, bmp_px_sz,
5131 &bmp_file, header_bmp.px_offset,
5132 mfile_get_sz( &bmp_file ) - header_bmp.px_offset, bmp_flags );
5133 maug_cleanup_if_not_ok();
5134
5135 /* Allocate buffer for unpacking. */
5136 debug_printf( 0, "creating bitmap: " SIZE_T_FMT " x " SIZE_T_FMT,
5137 bmp_out->tex.w, bmp_out->tex.h );
5138 bmp_out->tex.bytes_h = maug_malloc( bmp_out->tex.w * bmp_out->tex.h, 4 );
5139 maug_cleanup_if_null_alloc( MAUG_MHANDLE, bmp_out->tex.bytes_h );
5140
5141 maug_mlock( bmp_out->tex.bytes_h, bmp_out->tex.bytes );
5142 maug_cleanup_if_null_alloc( uint8_t*, bmp_out->tex.bytes );
5143
5144 /* Unpack palletized bitmap into BGRA with color key. */
5145 for( i = 0 ; bmp_px_sz > i ; i++ ) {
5146 if( bmp_px_sz - i - 1 > bmp_px_sz ) {
5147 error_printf(
5148 "pixel overflow! (" OFF_T_FMT " of " OFF_T_FMT " bytes!)",
5149 bmp_px_sz - i - 1, bmp_px_sz );
5150 retval = MERROR_OVERFLOW;
5151 goto cleanup;
5152 }
5153
5154 /* Grab the color from the palette by index. */
5155 bmp_color_idx = bmp_px[bmp_px_sz - i - 1]; /* Reverse image. */
5156 if( bmp_color_idx >= header_bmp.info.palette_ncolors ) {
5157 error_printf(
5158 "invalid color at px " OFF_T_FMT ": %02x",
5159 bmp_px_sz - i - 1, bmp_color_idx );
5160 continue;
5161 }
5162 bmp_color = bmp_palette[bmp_color_idx];
5163 bmp_r = (bmp_color >> 16) & 0xff;
5164 bmp_g = (bmp_color >> 8) & 0xff;
5165 bmp_b = bmp_color & 0xff;
5166
5167 bmp_out->tex.bytes[i * 4] = bmp_r;
5168 bmp_out->tex.bytes[(i * 4) + 1] = bmp_g;
5169 bmp_out->tex.bytes[(i * 4) + 2] = bmp_b;
5170 if(
5171 RETROFLAT_FLAGS_OPAQUE != (RETROFLAT_FLAGS_OPAQUE & flags) &&
5172 RETROFLAT_TXP_R == bmp_r &&
5173 RETROFLAT_TXP_G == bmp_g &&
5174 RETROFLAT_TXP_B == bmp_b
5175 ) {
5176 /* Transparent pixel found. */
5177 bmp_out->tex.bytes[(i * 4) + 3] = 0x00;
5178 } else {
5179 bmp_out->tex.bytes[(i * 4) + 3] = 0xff;
5180 }
5181 }
5182
5183#ifndef RETROGLU_NO_TEXTURES
5184 glGenTextures( 1, (GLuint*)&(bmp_out->tex.id) );
5185 glBindTexture( GL_TEXTURE_2D, bmp_out->tex.id );
5186 glTexImage2D( GL_TEXTURE_2D, 0, GL_RGBA, bmp_out->tex.w, bmp_out->tex.h, 0,
5187 GL_RGBA, GL_UNSIGNED_BYTE, bmp_out->tex.bytes );
5188 glBindTexture( GL_TEXTURE_2D, 0 );
5189#endif /* !RETROGLU_NO_TEXTURES */
5190
5191cleanup:
5192
5193 if( NULL != bmp_out->tex.bytes ) {
5194 maug_munlock( bmp_out->tex.bytes_h, bmp_out->tex.bytes );
5195 }
5196
5197 if( NULL != bmp_px ) {
5198 maug_munlock( bmp_px_h, bmp_px );
5199 }
5200
5201 if( NULL != bmp_px_h ) {
5202 maug_mfree( bmp_px_h );
5203 }
5204
5205 if( NULL != bmp_palette ) {
5206 maug_munlock( bmp_palette_h, bmp_palette );
5207 }
5208
5209 if( NULL != bmp_palette_h ) {
5210 maug_mfree( bmp_palette_h );
5211 }
5212
5213 mfile_close( &bmp_file );
5214
5215# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_ALLEGRO )
5216
5217 /* == Allegro == */
5218
5219 bmp_out->b = load_bitmap( filename_path, NULL );
5220 if( NULL == bmp_out->b ) {
5221 allegro_message( "unable to load %s", filename_path );
5222 retval = RETROFLAT_ERROR_BITMAP;
5223 }
5224
5225# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_SDL1 )
5226
5227 /* == SDL1 == */
5228
5229 debug_printf( RETROFLAT_BITMAP_TRACE_LVL,
5230 "loading bitmap: %s", filename_path );
5231
5232 tmp_surface = SDL_LoadBMP( filename_path ); /* Free stream on close. */
5233 if( NULL == tmp_surface ) {
5234 retroflat_message( RETROFLAT_MSG_FLAG_ERROR,
5235 "Error", "SDL unable to load bitmap: %s", SDL_GetError() );
5236 retval = 0;
5237 goto cleanup;
5238 }
5239
5240 debug_printf( RETROFLAT_BITMAP_TRACE_LVL,
5241 "loaded bitmap: %d x %d", tmp_surface->w, tmp_surface->h );
5242
5243 bmp_out->surface = SDL_DisplayFormat( tmp_surface );
5244 if( NULL == bmp_out->surface ) {
5245 retroflat_message( RETROFLAT_MSG_FLAG_ERROR,
5246 "Error", "SDL unable to load bitmap: %s", SDL_GetError() );
5247 retval = RETROFLAT_ERROR_BITMAP;
5248 goto cleanup;
5249 }
5250
5251 debug_printf( RETROFLAT_BITMAP_TRACE_LVL, "converted bitmap: %d x %d",
5252 bmp_out->surface->w, bmp_out->surface->h );
5253
5254 SDL_SetColorKey( bmp_out->surface, RETROFLAT_SDL_CC_FLAGS,
5255 SDL_MapRGB( bmp_out->surface->format,
5256 RETROFLAT_TXP_R, RETROFLAT_TXP_G, RETROFLAT_TXP_B ) );
5257
5258cleanup:
5259
5260 if( NULL != tmp_surface ) {
5261 SDL_FreeSurface( tmp_surface );
5262 }
5263
5264# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_SDL2 )
5265
5266 /* == SDL2 == */
5267
5268 debug_printf( RETROFLAT_BITMAP_TRACE_LVL,
5269 "loading bitmap: %s", filename_path );
5270
5271 bmp_out->renderer = NULL;
5272
5273 bmp_out->surface = SDL_LoadBMP( filename_path );
5274 if( NULL == bmp_out->surface ) {
5275 retroflat_message( RETROFLAT_MSG_FLAG_ERROR,
5276 "Error", "SDL unable to load bitmap: %s", SDL_GetError() );
5277 retval = RETROFLAT_ERROR_BITMAP;
5278 goto cleanup;
5279 }
5280
5281 if( RETROFLAT_FLAGS_OPAQUE != (RETROFLAT_FLAGS_OPAQUE & flags) ) {
5282 SDL_SetColorKey( bmp_out->surface, RETROFLAT_SDL_CC_FLAGS,
5283 SDL_MapRGB( bmp_out->surface->format,
5284 RETROFLAT_TXP_R, RETROFLAT_TXP_G, RETROFLAT_TXP_B ) );
5285 }
5286
5287 bmp_out->texture = SDL_CreateTextureFromSurface(
5288 g_retroflat_state->buffer.renderer, bmp_out->surface );
5289 if( NULL == bmp_out->texture ) {
5290 retroflat_message( RETROFLAT_MSG_FLAG_ERROR,
5291 "Error", "SDL unable to create texture: %s", SDL_GetError() );
5292 retval = RETROFLAT_ERROR_BITMAP;
5293 if( NULL != bmp_out->surface ) {
5294 SDL_FreeSurface( bmp_out->surface );
5295 bmp_out->surface = NULL;
5296 }
5297 goto cleanup;
5298 }
5299
5300 debug_printf( RETROFLAT_BITMAP_TRACE_LVL,
5301 "successfully loaded bitmap: %s", filename_path );
5302
5303cleanup:
5304
5305# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_WIN16 ) || defined( RETROFLAT_API_WIN32 )
5306
5307# if defined( RETROFLAT_API_WIN16 )
5308
5309 /* Win16 has a bunch of extra involved steps for getting a bitmap from
5310 * disk. These cause a crash in Win32.
5311 */
5312
5313 /* == Win16 == */
5314
5315 /* Load the bitmap file from disk. */
5316 retval = mfile_open_read( filename_path, &bmp_file );
5317 maug_cleanup_if_not_ok();
5318
5319 buf = calloc( mfile_get_sz( &bmp_file ), 1 );
5320 maug_cleanup_if_null_alloc( char*, buf );
5321
5322 /*
5323 read = fread( buf, 1, sz, bmp_file );
5324 assert( read == sz );
5325 */
5326 retval = bmp_file.read_int( &bmp_file, buf, mfile_get_sz( &bmp_file ), 0 );
5327 maug_cleanup_if_not_ok();
5328
5329 /* Read bitmap properties from header offsets. */
5330 retval = bmp_file.seek( &bmp_file, 10 );
5331 maug_cleanup_if_not_ok();
5332 retval = bmp_file.read_int( &bmp_file,
5333 (uint8_t*)&offset, 4, MFILE_READ_FLAG_LSBF );
5334 maug_cleanup_if_not_ok();
5335
5336 retval = bmp_file.seek( &bmp_file, 46 );
5337 maug_cleanup_if_not_ok();
5338 retval = bmp_file.read_int( &bmp_file,
5339 (uint8_t*)&colors, 4, MFILE_READ_FLAG_LSBF );
5340 maug_cleanup_if_not_ok();
5341
5342 /* Avoid a color overflow. */
5343 if(
5344 sizeof( BITMAPFILEHEADER ) +
5345 sizeof( BITMAPINFOHEADER ) +
5346 (colors * sizeof( RGBQUAD )) > sz
5347 ) {
5348 retroflat_message( RETROFLAT_MSG_FLAG_ERROR,
5349 "Error",
5350 "Attempted to load bitmap with too many colors!" );
5351 retval = MERROR_FILE;
5352 goto cleanup;
5353 }
5354
5355 memcpy( &(bmp_out->bmi),
5356 &(buf[sizeof( BITMAPFILEHEADER )]),
5357 /* SetDIBits needs the color palette! */
5358 /* TODO: Sync with state palette? */
5359 sizeof( BITMAPINFOHEADER ) + (colors * sizeof( RGBQUAD )) );
5360
5361 /* This never gets the height right? */
5362 debug_printf( 1, "bitmap w: %08x, h: %08x, colors: %d",
5363 bmp_out->bmi.header.biWidth, bmp_out->bmi.header.biHeight, colors );
5364
5365 assert( 0 < bmp_out->bmi.header.biWidth );
5366 assert( 0 < bmp_out->bmi.header.biHeight );
5367 assert( 0 == bmp_out->bmi.header.biWidth % 8 );
5368 assert( 0 == bmp_out->bmi.header.biHeight % 8 );
5369
5370 bmp_out->b = CreateCompatibleBitmap( g_retroflat_state->hdc_win,
5371 bmp_out->bmi.header.biWidth, bmp_out->bmi.header.biHeight );
5372 maug_cleanup_if_null( HBITMAP, bmp_out->b, RETROFLAT_ERROR_BITMAP );
5373
5374 /* Turn the bits into a bitmap. */
5375 SetDIBits( g_retroflat_state->hdc_win, bmp_out->b, 0,
5376 bmp_out->bmi.header.biHeight, &(buf[offset]),
5377 (BITMAPINFO*)&(bmp_out->bmi),
5378 DIB_RGB_COLORS );
5379
5380 if( RETROFLAT_FLAGS_OPAQUE != (RETROFLAT_FLAGS_OPAQUE & flags) ) {
5381 retval = retroflat_bitmap_win_transparency( bmp_out,
5382 bmp_out->bmi.header.biWidth, bmp_out->bmi.header.biHeight );
5383 }
5384
5385# else
5386
5387 /* Win32 greatly simplifies the loading portion. */
5388
5389 /* == Win32 == */
5390
5391# ifdef RETROFLAT_API_WINCE
5392 bmp_out->b = SHLoadDIBitmap( filename_path );
5393# else
5394 bmp_out->b = LoadImage(
5395 NULL, filename_path, IMAGE_BITMAP, 0, 0, LR_LOADFROMFILE );
5396# endif /* RETROFLAT_API_WINCE */
5397 maug_cleanup_if_null_msg(
5398 HBITMAP, bmp_out->b, MERROR_FILE, "failed to open FILE!" )
5399
5400 GetObject( bmp_out->b, sizeof( BITMAP ), &bm );
5401
5402 bmp_out->bmi.header.biSize = sizeof( BITMAPINFOHEADER );
5403 bmp_out->bmi.header.biCompression = BI_RGB;
5404 bmp_out->bmi.header.biWidth = bm.bmWidth;
5405 bmp_out->bmi.header.biHeight = bm.bmHeight;
5406 bmp_out->bmi.header.biPlanes = bm.bmPlanes;
5407 bmp_out->bmi.header.biBitCount = bm.bmBitsPixel;
5408 bmp_out->bmi.header.biSizeImage =
5409 bmp_out->bmi.header.biWidth *
5410 bmp_out->bmi.header.biHeight *
5411 (bm.bmBitsPixel / sizeof( uint8_t ));
5412
5413 if( RETROFLAT_FLAGS_OPAQUE != (RETROFLAT_FLAGS_OPAQUE & flags) ) {
5414 retval = retroflat_bitmap_win_transparency(
5415 bmp_out, bm.bmWidth, bm.bmHeight );
5416 }
5417
5418# endif /* RETROFLAT_API_WIN16 */
5419
5420 /* The transparency portion is the same for Win32 and Win16. */
5421
5422cleanup:
5423
5424# ifdef RETROFLAT_API_WIN16
5425 if( NULL != buf ) {
5426 free( buf );
5427 }
5428
5429 mfile_close( &bmp_file );
5430
5431# endif /* RETROFLAT_API_WIN16 */
5432
5433# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_PC_BIOS )
5434
5435 /* TODO: Rework for CGA bitmaps. */
5436
5437 assert( NULL == bmp_out->px );
5438
5439 retval = mfile_open_read( filename_path, &bmp_file );
5440 maug_cleanup_if_not_ok();
5441
5442 /* TODO: mfmt file detection system. */
5443 header_bmp.magic[0] = 'B';
5444 header_bmp.magic[1] = 'M';
5445 header_bmp.info.sz = 40;
5446
5447 retval = mfmt_read_bmp_header(
5448 (struct MFMT_STRUCT*)&header_bmp,
5449 &bmp_file, 0, mfile_get_sz( &bmp_file ), &bmp_flags );
5450 maug_cleanup_if_not_ok();
5451
5452 /* Setup bitmap options from header. */
5453 bmp_out->w = header_bmp.info.width;
5454 bmp_out->h = header_bmp.info.height;
5455
5456#if 0
5457 retval = mfmt_read_bmp_palette(
5458 (struct MFMT_STRUCT*)&header_bmp,
5459 bmp_palette, 4 * header_bmp.info.palette_ncolors,
5460 &bmp_file, 54 /* TODO */, mfile_get_sz( &bmp_file ) - 54, bmp_flags );
5461 maug_cleanup_if_not_ok();
5462#endif
5463
5464 bmp_out->flags = flags;
5465
5466 /* Allocate a space for the bitmap pixels. */
5467 bmp_out->sz = header_bmp.info.width * header_bmp.info.height;
5468 /* We're on PC BIOS... we don't need to lock pointers in this
5469 * platform-specific code!
5470 */
5471 bmp_out->px = _fcalloc( header_bmp.info.height, header_bmp.info.width );
5472 maug_cleanup_if_null_alloc( uint8_t*, bmp_out->px );
5473
5474 retval = mfmt_read_bmp_px(
5475 (struct MFMT_STRUCT*)&header_bmp,
5476 bmp_out->px, bmp_out->sz,
5477 &bmp_file, header_bmp.px_offset,
5478 mfile_get_sz( &bmp_file ) - header_bmp.px_offset, bmp_flags );
5479 maug_cleanup_if_not_ok();
5480
5481 if( RETROFLAT_FLAGS_OPAQUE != (RETROFLAT_FLAGS_OPAQUE & flags) ) {
5482 retval = retroflat_bitmap_dos_transparency( bmp_out );
5483 }
5484
5485cleanup:
5486
5487# else
5488# pragma message( "warning: load bitmap not implemented" )
5489# endif /* RETROFLAT_API_ALLEGRO */
5490
5491 return retval;
5492}
5493
5494/* === */
5495
5496MERROR_RETVAL retroflat_create_bitmap(
5497 size_t w, size_t h, struct RETROFLAT_BITMAP* bmp_out, uint8_t flags
5498) {
5499 MERROR_RETVAL retval = MERROR_OK;
5500# if defined( RETROFLAT_OPENGL )
5501# ifndef RETROGLU_NO_TEXTURES
5502 GLenum error = GL_NO_ERROR;
5503# endif /* !RETROGLU_NO_TEXTURES */
5504# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_WIN16 ) || defined( RETROFLAT_API_WIN32 )
5505 int i = 0;
5506 PALETTEENTRY palette[RETROFLAT_BMP_COLORS_SZ_MAX];
5507# endif /* RETROFLAT_API_WIN16 || RETROFLAT_API_WIN32 */
5508
5509 maug_mzero( bmp_out, sizeof( struct RETROFLAT_BITMAP ) );
5510
5511 bmp_out->sz = sizeof( struct RETROFLAT_BITMAP );
5512
5513# if defined( RETROFLAT_OPENGL )
5514
5515 if( w > 256 ) {
5516 error_printf( "warning! attempting to create texture with w > 256 ("
5517 SIZE_T_FMT "). This may not work on Win32!", w );
5518 }
5519
5520 if( h > 256 ) {
5521 error_printf( "warning! attempting to create texture with h > 256 ("
5522 SIZE_T_FMT "). This may not work on Win32!", h );
5523 }
5524
5525 bmp_out->tex.w = w;
5526 bmp_out->tex.h = h;
5527 /* TODO: Overflow checking. */
5528 debug_printf( 0, "creating bitmap: " SIZE_T_FMT " x " SIZE_T_FMT,
5529 bmp_out->tex.w, bmp_out->tex.h );
5530 bmp_out->tex.bytes_h =
5531 maug_malloc( bmp_out->tex.w * bmp_out->tex.h, 4 );
5532 maug_cleanup_if_null_alloc( MAUG_MHANDLE, bmp_out->tex.bytes_h );
5533
5534 maug_mlock( bmp_out->tex.bytes_h, bmp_out->tex.bytes );
5535 maug_cleanup_if_null_alloc( uint8_t*, bmp_out->tex.bytes );
5536
5537 /* TODO: Overflow checking. */
5538 maug_mzero(
5539 bmp_out->tex.bytes,
5540 bmp_out->tex.w * bmp_out->tex.h * sizeof( uint32_t ) );
5541
5542# ifndef RETROGLU_NO_TEXTURES
5543 glGenTextures( 1, (GLuint*)&(bmp_out->tex.id) );
5544 debug_printf( RETROFLAT_BITMAP_TRACE_LVL,
5545 "assigned bitmap texture: " UPRINTF_U32_FMT, bmp_out->tex.id );
5546 error = glGetError();
5547 if( GL_NO_ERROR != error ) {
5548 error_printf( "error generating texture: %u", error );
5549 }
5550# endif /* !RETROGLU_NO_TEXTURES */
5551
5552cleanup:
5553 if( NULL != bmp_out->tex.bytes ) {
5554 maug_munlock( bmp_out->tex.bytes_h, bmp_out->tex.bytes );
5555 }
5556# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_ALLEGRO )
5557
5558 /* == Allegro == */
5559
5560 bmp_out->b = create_bitmap( w, h );
5561 maug_cleanup_if_null( BITMAP*, bmp_out->b, RETROFLAT_ERROR_BITMAP );
5562 clear_bitmap( bmp_out->b );
5563
5564cleanup:
5565# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_SDL1 )
5566
5567 /* == SDL1 == */
5568
5569 bmp_out->surface = SDL_CreateRGBSurface( 0, w, h,
5570 32, 0, 0, 0, 0 );
5571 maug_cleanup_if_null(
5572 SDL_Surface*, bmp_out->surface, RETROFLAT_ERROR_BITMAP );
5573 if( RETROFLAT_FLAGS_OPAQUE != (RETROFLAT_FLAGS_OPAQUE & flags) ) {
5574 SDL_SetColorKey( bmp_out->surface, RETROFLAT_SDL_CC_FLAGS,
5575 SDL_MapRGB( bmp_out->surface->format,
5576 RETROFLAT_TXP_R, RETROFLAT_TXP_G, RETROFLAT_TXP_B ) );
5577 }
5578
5579cleanup:
5580# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_SDL2 )
5581
5582 /* == SDL2 == */
5583
5584 /* Create surface. */
5585 bmp_out->surface = SDL_CreateRGBSurface( 0, w, h,
5586 /* TODO: Are these masks right? */
5587 32, 0, 0, 0, 0 );
5588 maug_cleanup_if_null(
5589 SDL_Surface*, bmp_out->surface, RETROFLAT_ERROR_BITMAP );
5590 if( RETROFLAT_FLAGS_OPAQUE != (RETROFLAT_FLAGS_OPAQUE & flags) ) {
5591 SDL_SetColorKey( bmp_out->surface, RETROFLAT_SDL_CC_FLAGS,
5592 SDL_MapRGB( bmp_out->surface->format,
5593 RETROFLAT_TXP_R, RETROFLAT_TXP_G, RETROFLAT_TXP_B ) );
5594 }
5595
5596 /* Convert new surface to texture. */
5597 bmp_out->texture = SDL_CreateTextureFromSurface(
5598 g_retroflat_state->buffer.renderer, bmp_out->surface );
5599 maug_cleanup_if_null(
5600 SDL_Texture*, bmp_out->texture, RETROFLAT_ERROR_BITMAP );
5601
5602cleanup:
5603# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_WIN16 ) || defined( RETROFLAT_API_WIN32 )
5604
5605 /* == Win16 / Win32 == */
5606
5607 /* TODO: Handle opaque flag. */
5608 bmp_out->mask = (HBITMAP)NULL;
5609
5610# ifdef RETROFLAT_WING
5611 /* Put this first because WinGRecommendDIBFormat sets some header props. */
5612 if(
5613 RETROFLAT_FLAGS_SCREEN_BUFFER ==
5614 (RETROFLAT_FLAGS_SCREEN_BUFFER & flags) &&
5615 (WinGCreateDC_t)NULL != g_w.WinGCreateDC &&
5616 (WinGRecommendDIBFormat_t)NULL != g_w.WinGRecommendDIBFormat
5617 ) {
5618 bmp_out->hdc_b = g_w.WinGCreateDC();
5619
5620 if(
5621 !g_w.WinGRecommendDIBFormat( (BITMAPINFO far*)&(bmp_out->bmi) )
5622 ) {
5623 retroflat_message( RETROFLAT_MSG_FLAG_ERROR,
5624 "Error", "Could not determine recommended format!" );
5625 retval = RETROFLAT_ERROR_GRAPHICS;
5626 goto cleanup;
5627 }
5628 }
5629# endif /* RETROFLAT_WING */
5630
5631 debug_printf( 0, "creating bitmap..." );
5632
5633 bmp_out->bmi.header.biSize = sizeof( BITMAPINFOHEADER );
5634 bmp_out->bmi.header.biPlanes = 1;
5635 bmp_out->bmi.header.biCompression = BI_RGB;
5636 bmp_out->bmi.header.biWidth = w;
5637# ifdef RETROFLAT_WING
5638 bmp_out->bmi.header.biHeight *= h;
5639# else
5640 bmp_out->bmi.header.biHeight = h;
5641# endif /* RETROFLAT_WING */
5642 bmp_out->bmi.header.biBitCount = 32;
5643 bmp_out->bmi.header.biSizeImage = w * h * 4;
5644
5645 GetSystemPaletteEntries(
5646 g_retroflat_state->hdc_win, 0, RETROFLAT_BMP_COLORS_SZ_MAX, palette );
5647 for( i = 0 ; RETROFLAT_BMP_COLORS_SZ_MAX > i ; i++ ) {
5648 bmp_out->bmi.colors[i].rgbRed = palette[i].peRed;
5649 bmp_out->bmi.colors[i].rgbGreen = palette[i].peGreen;
5650 bmp_out->bmi.colors[i].rgbBlue = palette[i].peBlue;
5651 bmp_out->bmi.colors[i].rgbReserved = 0;
5652 }
5653
5654# ifdef RETROFLAT_WING
5655 /* Now try to create the WinG bitmap using the header we've built. */
5656 if(
5657 RETROFLAT_FLAGS_SCREEN_BUFFER ==
5658 (RETROFLAT_FLAGS_SCREEN_BUFFER & flags) &&
5659 (WinGCreateBitmap_t)NULL != g_w.WinGCreateBitmap
5660 ) {
5661 /* Setup an optimal WinG hardware screen buffer bitmap. */
5662 debug_printf( 1, "creating WinG-backed bitmap..." );
5663
5664 bmp_out->flags |= RETROFLAT_FLAGS_SCREEN_BUFFER;
5665 bmp_out->b = g_w.WinGCreateBitmap(
5666 bmp_out->hdc_b,
5667 (BITMAPINFO far*)(&bmp_out->bmi),
5668 (void far*)&(bmp_out->bits) );
5669
5670 debug_printf( 1, "WinG bitmap bits: %p", bmp_out->bits );
5671
5672 } else {
5673# endif /* RETROFLAT_WING */
5674
5675 bmp_out->b = CreateCompatibleBitmap( g_retroflat_state->hdc_win, w, h );
5676 maug_cleanup_if_null( HBITMAP, bmp_out->b, RETROFLAT_ERROR_BITMAP );
5677
5678 if(
5679 RETROFLAT_FLAGS_SCREEN_BUFFER == (RETROFLAT_FLAGS_SCREEN_BUFFER & flags)
5680 ) {
5681 debug_printf( 1, "creating screen device context..." );
5682 bmp_out->hdc_b = CreateCompatibleDC( g_retroflat_state->hdc_win );
5683 bmp_out->old_hbm_b = SelectObject( bmp_out->hdc_b, bmp_out->b );
5684 }
5685
5686# ifdef RETROFLAT_WING
5687 }
5688# endif /* RETROFLAT_WING */
5689
5690cleanup:
5691
5692# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_PC_BIOS )
5693
5694 assert( NULL == bmp_out->px );
5695
5696 bmp_out->w = w;
5697 bmp_out->h = h;
5698 bmp_out->flags = flags;
5699
5700 /* Allocate a space for the bitmap pixels. */
5701 bmp_out->sz = w * h;
5702 /* We're on PC BIOS... we don't need to lock pointers in this
5703 * platform-specific code!
5704 */
5705 bmp_out->px = _fcalloc( w, h );
5706 maug_cleanup_if_null_alloc( uint8_t*, bmp_out->px );
5707
5708cleanup:
5709# else
5710# pragma message( "warning: create bitmap not implemented" )
5711# endif /* RETROFLAT_API_ALLEGRO || RETROFLAT_API_SDL1 || RETROFLAT_API_SDL2 || RETROFLAT_API_WIN16 || RETROFLAT_API_WIN32 */
5712
5713 return retval;
5714}
5715
5716/* === */
5717
5718void retroflat_destroy_bitmap( struct RETROFLAT_BITMAP* bmp ) {
5719
5720# if defined( RETROFLAT_OPENGL )
5721
5722 if( NULL != bmp->tex.bytes_h ) {
5723 if( NULL != bmp->tex.bytes ) {
5724 maug_munlock( bmp->tex.bytes_h, bmp->tex.bytes );
5725 }
5726
5727 maug_mfree( bmp->tex.bytes_h );
5728 }
5729
5730#ifndef RETROGLU_NO_TEXTURES
5731 if( 0 < bmp->tex.id ) {
5732 debug_printf( 0,
5733 "destroying bitmap texture: " UPRINTF_U32_FMT, bmp->tex.id );
5734 glDeleteTextures( 1, (GLuint*)&(bmp->tex.id) );
5735 }
5736#endif /* !RETROGLU_NO_TEXTURES */
5737
5738# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_ALLEGRO )
5739
5740 /* == Allegro == */
5741
5742 if( NULL == bmp->b ) {
5743 return;
5744 }
5745
5746 destroy_bitmap( bmp->b );
5747 bmp->b = NULL;
5748
5749# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_SDL1 ) || defined( RETROFLAT_API_SDL2 )
5750
5751 assert( NULL != bmp );
5752 assert( NULL != bmp->surface );
5753
5754# ifndef RETROFLAT_API_SDL1
5755 assert( NULL != bmp->texture );
5756
5757 SDL_DestroyTexture( bmp->texture );
5758 bmp->texture = NULL;
5759# endif /* !RETROFLAT_API_SDL1 */
5760
5761 SDL_FreeSurface( bmp->surface );
5762 bmp->surface = NULL;
5763
5764# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_WIN16 ) || defined( RETROFLAT_API_WIN32 )
5765
5766 /* == Win16 == */
5767
5768 if( NULL != bmp->old_hbm_b ) {
5769 SelectObject( bmp->hdc_b, bmp->old_hbm_b );
5770 bmp->old_hbm_b = (HBITMAP)NULL;
5771 bmp->old_hbm_b = (HBITMAP)NULL;
5772 }
5773
5774 if( (HBITMAP)NULL != bmp->b ) {
5775 DeleteObject( bmp->b );
5776 bmp->b = (HBITMAP)NULL;
5777 }
5778
5779 if( (HBITMAP)NULL != bmp->mask ) {
5780 DeleteObject( bmp->mask );
5781 bmp->mask = (HBITMAP)NULL;
5782 }
5783
5784# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_PC_BIOS )
5785
5786 if( NULL != bmp->px ) {
5787 _ffree( bmp->px );
5788 bmp->px = NULL;
5789 }
5790
5791 if( NULL != bmp->mask ) {
5792 _ffree( bmp->mask );
5793 bmp->mask = NULL;
5794 }
5795
5796# else
5797# pragma message( "warning: destroy bitmap not implemented" )
5798# endif /* RETROFLAT_API_ALLEGRO || RETROFLAT_API_SDL1 || RETROFLAT_API_SDL2 || RETROFLAT_API_WIN16 || RETROFLAT_API_WIN32 */
5799}
5800
5801/* === */
5802
5803void retroflat_blit_bitmap(
5804 struct RETROFLAT_BITMAP* target, struct RETROFLAT_BITMAP* src,
5805 int s_x, int s_y, int d_x, int d_y, int16_t w, int16_t h
5806) {
5807# if defined( RETROFLAT_OPENGL )
5808 int y_iter = 0;
5809# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_SDL1 ) && !defined( RETROFLAT_OPENGL )
5810 MERROR_RETVAL retval = MERROR_OK;
5811 SDL_Rect src_rect;
5812 SDL_Rect dest_rect;
5813# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_SDL2 )
5814 MERROR_RETVAL retval = MERROR_OK;
5815 SDL_Rect src_rect = { s_x, s_y, w, h };
5816 SDL_Rect dest_rect = { d_x, d_y, w, h };
5817# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_WIN16 ) || defined( RETROFLAT_API_WIN32 )
5818 MERROR_RETVAL retval = MERROR_OK;
5819 int locked_src_internal = 0;
5820# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_PC_BIOS )
5821 int16_t y_iter = 0,
5822 x_iter = 0;
5823 uint16_t target_line_offset = 0;
5824 int16_t src_line_offset = 0;
5825 MERROR_RETVAL retval = MERROR_OK;
5826# endif /* RETROFLAT_API_SDL2 || RETROFLAT_API_WIN16 || RETROFLAT_API_WIN32 */
5827
5828# ifndef RETROFLAT_OPENGL
5829 if( NULL == target ) {
5830 target = retroflat_screen_buffer();
5831 }
5832# endif /* RETROFLAT_OPENGL */
5833
5834 assert( NULL != src );
5835
5836# if defined( RETROFLAT_OPENGL )
5837
5838 if( NULL == target || retroflat_screen_buffer() == target ) {
5839 /* TODO: Create ortho sprite on screen. */
5840
5841 } else {
5842 /* Blit to texture. */
5843
5844 assert( NULL != target->tex.bytes );
5845
5846 /* TODO: Some kind of source-autolock? */
5847 assert( !retroflat_bitmap_locked( src ) );
5848 maug_mlock( src->tex.bytes_h, src->tex.bytes );
5849 for( y_iter = 0 ; h > y_iter ; y_iter++ ) {
5850 /* TODO: Handle transparency! */
5851 memcpy(
5852 &(target->tex.bytes[(((y_iter * target->tex.w) + d_x) * 4)]),
5853 &(src->tex.bytes[(((y_iter * src->tex.w) + s_x) * 4)]),
5854 w * 4 );
5855 }
5856 maug_munlock( src->tex.bytes_h, src->tex.bytes );
5857
5858 }
5859
5860# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_ALLEGRO )
5861
5862 /* == Allegro == */
5863
5864 assert( NULL != target->b );
5865 assert( NULL != src->b );
5866
5867 if(
5868 0 == s_x && 0 == s_y &&
5869 ((-1 == w && -1 == h ) || (src->b->w == w && src->b->h == h))
5870 ) {
5871 draw_sprite( target->b, src->b, d_x, d_y );
5872 } else {
5873 /* Handle partial blit. */
5874 blit( src->b, target->b, s_x, s_y, d_x, d_y, w, h );
5875 }
5876
5877# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_SDL1 ) || defined( RETROFLAT_API_SDL2 )
5878
5879 /* == SDL == */
5880
5881 src_rect.x = s_x;
5882 src_rect.y = s_y;
5883 src_rect.w = w;
5884 src_rect.h = h;
5885 dest_rect.x = d_x;
5886 dest_rect.y = d_y;
5887 dest_rect.w = w;
5888 dest_rect.h = h;
5889
5890# ifdef RETROFLAT_API_SDL1
5891 assert( 0 == src->autolock_refs );
5892 assert( 0 == target->autolock_refs );
5893 retval =
5894 SDL_BlitSurface( src->surface, &src_rect, target->surface, &dest_rect );
5895 if( 0 != retval ) {
5896 error_printf( "could not blit surface: %s", SDL_GetError() );
5897 }
5898# else
5899
5900 assert( retroflat_bitmap_locked( target ) );
5901 retval = SDL_RenderCopy(
5902 target->renderer, src->texture, &src_rect, &dest_rect );
5903 if( 0 != retval ) {
5904 error_printf( "could not blit surface: %s", SDL_GetError() );
5905 }
5906
5907# endif /* !RETROFLAT_API_SDL1 */
5908
5909# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_WIN16 ) || defined( RETROFLAT_API_WIN32 )
5910
5911 /* == Win16/Win32 == */
5912
5913 assert( (HBITMAP)NULL != target->b );
5914 assert( (HBITMAP)NULL != src->b );
5915
5916 retroflat_internal_autolock_bitmap( src, locked_src_internal );
5917 assert( retroflat_bitmap_locked( target ) );
5918
5919 if( (HBITMAP)NULL != src->mask ) {
5920 /* Use mask to blit transparency. */
5921 BitBlt(
5922 target->hdc_b, d_x, d_y, w, h, src->hdc_mask, s_x, s_y, SRCAND );
5923
5924 /* Do actual blit. */
5925 BitBlt(
5926 target->hdc_b, d_x, d_y, w, h, src->hdc_b, s_x, s_y, SRCPAINT );
5927 } else {
5928 /* Just overwrite entire rect. */
5929 BitBlt(
5930 target->hdc_b, d_x, d_y, w, h, src->hdc_b, s_x, s_y, SRCCOPY );
5931 }
5932
5933cleanup:
5934
5935 if( locked_src_internal ) {
5936 retroflat_draw_release( src );
5937 }
5938
5939# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_PC_BIOS )
5940
5941 if( NULL == target ) {
5942 target = &(g_retroflat_state->buffer);
5943 }
5944
5945 switch( g_retroflat_state->screen_mode ) {
5946 case RETROFLAT_SCREEN_MODE_VGA:
5947 for( y_iter = 0 ; h > y_iter ; y_iter++ ) {
5948 target_line_offset = ((d_y + y_iter) * (target->w)) + d_x;
5949 src_line_offset = ((s_y + y_iter) * src->w) + s_x;
5950 if( target->sz <= target_line_offset + w ) {
5951 continue;
5952 }
5953 /* Blit the line. */
5954 if(
5955 RETROFLAT_FLAGS_OPAQUE ==
5956 (RETROFLAT_FLAGS_OPAQUE & src->flags)
5957 ) {
5958 /* Copy line-by-line for speed. */
5959 _fmemcpy(
5960 &(target->px[target_line_offset]),
5961 &(src->px[src_line_offset]), w );
5962 } else {
5963 for( x_iter = 0 ; w > x_iter ; x_iter++ ) {
5964 /* AND with mask for transparency cutout. */
5965 target->px[target_line_offset + x_iter] &=
5966 src->mask[src_line_offset + x_iter];
5967 /* Draw into cutout with OR. */
5968 target->px[target_line_offset + x_iter] |=
5969 src->px[src_line_offset + x_iter];
5970 }
5971 }
5972 }
5973 break;
5974
5975 default:
5976 error_printf( "bitmap blit unsupported in video mode: %d",
5977 g_retroflat_state->screen_mode );
5978 break;
5979 }
5980
5981# else
5982# pragma message( "warning: blit bitmap not implemented" )
5983# endif /* RETROFLAT_API_ALLEGRO */
5984 return;
5985}
5986
5987/* === */
5988
5989void retroflat_px(
5990 struct RETROFLAT_BITMAP* target, const RETROFLAT_COLOR color_idx,
5991 int16_t x, int16_t y, uint8_t flags
5992) {
5993# if defined( RETROFLAT_OPENGL )
5994# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_SDL1 )
5995 int offset = 0;
5996 uint8_t* px_1 = NULL;
5997 uint16_t* px_2 = NULL;
5998 uint32_t* px_4 = NULL;
5999 RETROFLAT_COLOR_DEF* color = &(g_retroflat_state->palette[color_idx]);
6000# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_SDL2 )
6001 RETROFLAT_COLOR_DEF* color = &(g_retroflat_state->palette[color_idx]);
6002# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_PC_BIOS )
6003 uint16_t screen_byte_offset = 0,
6004 screen_bit_offset = 0;
6005 uint8_t color = 0;
6006# endif /* RETROFLAT_API_SDL1 */
6007
6008 if( RETROFLAT_COLOR_NULL == color_idx ) {
6009 return;
6010 }
6011
6012 if( NULL == target ) {
6013 target = retroflat_screen_buffer();
6014 }
6015
6016 if(
6017 x < 0 || x >= retroflat_screen_w() ||
6018 y < 0 || y >= retroflat_screen_h()
6019 ) {
6020 return;
6021 }
6022
6023# if defined( RETROFLAT_OPENGL )
6024
6025 assert( NULL != target->tex.bytes );
6026 assert( retroflat_bitmap_locked( target ) );
6027
6028# if !defined( RETROFLAT_NO_BOUNDSC )
6029 if( (size_t)x >= target->tex.w ) {
6030 return;
6031 }
6032
6033 if( (size_t)y >= target->tex.h ) {
6034 return;
6035 }
6036# endif /* !RETROFLAT_NO_BOUNDSC */
6037
6038 /* Draw pixel colors from texture palette. */
6039 target->tex.bytes[(((y * target->tex.w) + x) * 4) + 0] =
6040 g_retroflat_state->tex_palette[color_idx][0];
6041 target->tex.bytes[(((y * target->tex.w) + x) * 4) + 1] =
6042 g_retroflat_state->tex_palette[color_idx][1];
6043 target->tex.bytes[(((y * target->tex.w) + x) * 4) + 2] =
6044 g_retroflat_state->tex_palette[color_idx][2];
6045
6046 /* Set pixel as opaque. */
6047 target->tex.bytes[(((y * target->tex.w) + x) * 4) + 3] = 0xff;
6048
6049# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_ALLEGRO )
6050
6051 /* == Allegro == */
6052
6053 putpixel( target->b, x, y, g_retroflat_state->palette[color_idx] );
6054
6055# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_SDL1 )
6056
6057 /* == SDL1 == */
6058
6059 retroflat_px_lock( target );
6060
6061 assert( 0 < target->autolock_refs );
6062
6063 offset = (y * target->surface->pitch) +
6064 (x * target->surface->format->BytesPerPixel);
6065
6066 switch( target->surface->format->BytesPerPixel ) {
6067 case 4:
6068 px_4 = (uint32_t*)&(((uint8_t*)(target->surface->pixels))[offset]);
6069 *px_4 =
6070 SDL_MapRGB( target->surface->format, color->r, color->g, color->b );
6071 break;
6072
6073 case 2:
6074 px_2 = (uint16_t*)&(((uint8_t*)(target->surface->pixels))[offset]);
6075 *px_2 =
6076 SDL_MapRGB( target->surface->format, color->r, color->g, color->b );
6077 break;
6078
6079 case 1:
6080 px_1 = (uint8_t*)&(((uint8_t*)(target->surface->pixels))[offset]);
6081 *px_1 =
6082 SDL_MapRGB( target->surface->format, color->r, color->g, color->b );
6083 break;
6084 }
6085
6086 retroflat_px_release( target );
6087
6088# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_SDL2 )
6089
6090 /* == SDL2 == */
6091
6092 assert( retroflat_bitmap_locked( target ) );
6093
6094 SDL_SetRenderDrawColor(
6095 target->renderer, color->r, color->g, color->b, 255 );
6096 SDL_RenderDrawPoint( target->renderer, x, y );
6097
6098# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_WIN16 ) || defined( RETROFLAT_API_WIN32 )
6099
6100 /* == Win16/Win32 == */
6101
6102 assert( retroflat_bitmap_locked( target ) );
6103
6104# ifdef RETROFLAT_WING
6105 if( NULL != target->bits ) {
6106 /* Modify target bits directly (faster) if available! */
6107 /* WinG bitmaps are 8-bit palettized, so use the index directly. */
6108 if( 0 > target->h ) {
6109 target->bits[((target->h - 1 - y) * target->tex.w) + x] =
6110 color_idx;
6111 } else {
6112 target->bits[(y * target->tex.w) + x] =
6113 color_idx;
6114 }
6115 } else {
6116 /* Use slow Windows GDI. */
6117 SetPixel( target->hdc_b, x, y,
6118 g_retroflat_state->palette[color_idx] );
6119 }
6120# else
6121 SetPixel( target->hdc_b, x, y,
6122 g_retroflat_state->palette[color_idx] );
6123# endif /* RETROFLAT_WING */
6124
6125# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_LIBNDS )
6126
6127 /* == Nintendo DS == */
6128
6129 uint16_t* px_ptr = NULL;
6130
6131 px_ptr = bgGetGfxPtr( g_retroflat_state->px_id );
6132 px_ptr[(y * 256) + x] = g_retroflat_state->palette[color_idx];
6133
6134# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_PC_BIOS )
6135
6136 /* == DOS PC_BIOS == */
6137
6138 /* TODO: Determine if we're drawing on-screen or on a bitmap. */
6139 if( NULL == target ) {
6140 target = &(g_retroflat_state->buffer);
6141 }
6142
6143 switch( g_retroflat_state->screen_mode ) {
6144 case RETROFLAT_SCREEN_MODE_CGA:
6145 /* Divide y by 2 since both planes are SCREEN_H / 2 high. */
6146 /* Divide result by 4 since it's 2 bits per pixel. */
6147 screen_byte_offset = (((y >> 1) * target->w) + x) >> 2;
6148 /* Shift the bits over by the remainder. */
6149 /* TODO: Factor out this modulo to shift/and. */
6150 screen_bit_offset = 6 - (((((y >> 1) * target->w) + x) % 4) << 1);
6151
6152 /* Dither colors on odd/even squares. */
6153 if( (x & 0x01 && y & 0x01) || (!(x & 0x01) && !(y & 0x01)) ) {
6154 color = g_retroflat_state->cga_color_table[color_idx];
6155 } else {
6156 color = g_retroflat_state->cga_dither_table[color_idx];
6157 }
6158
6159 if( target != &(g_retroflat_state->buffer) ) {
6160 /* TODO: Memory bitmap. */
6161
6162 } else if( y & 0x01 ) {
6163 /* 0x2000 = difference between even/odd CGA planes. */
6164 g_retroflat_state->buffer.px[0x2000 + screen_byte_offset] &=
6165 /* 0x03 = 2-bit pixel mask. */
6166 ~(0x03 << screen_bit_offset);
6167 g_retroflat_state->buffer.px[0x2000 + screen_byte_offset] |=
6168 ((color & 0x03) << screen_bit_offset);
6169 } else {
6170 /* 0x03 = 2-bit pixel mask. */
6171 g_retroflat_state->buffer.px[screen_byte_offset] &=
6172 ~(0x03 << screen_bit_offset);
6173 g_retroflat_state->buffer.px[screen_byte_offset] |=
6174 /* 0x03 = 2-bit pixel mask. */
6175 ((color & 0x03) << screen_bit_offset);
6176 }
6177 break;
6178
6179 case RETROFLAT_SCREEN_MODE_VGA:
6180 screen_byte_offset = ((y * target->w) + x);
6181 if( target->sz <= screen_byte_offset ) {
6182 break;
6183 }
6184 target->px[screen_byte_offset] = color_idx;
6185 break;
6186
6187 default:
6188 error_printf( "pixel blit unsupported in video mode: %d",
6189 g_retroflat_state->screen_mode );
6190 break;
6191 }
6192
6193# else
