6194# pragma message( "warning: px not implemented" )
6195# endif /* RETROFLAT_API_ALLEGRO || RETROFLAT_API_SDL1 || RETROFLAT_API_SDL2 || RETROFLAT_API_WIN16 || RETROFLAT_API_WIN32 */
6196
6197}
6198
6199/* === */
6200
6201void retroflat_rect(
6202 struct RETROFLAT_BITMAP* target, const RETROFLAT_COLOR color_idx,
6203 int16_t x, int16_t y, int16_t w, int16_t h, uint8_t flags
6204) {
6205# if defined( RETROFLAT_OPENGL )
6206 float aspect_ratio = 0,
6207 screen_x = 0,
6208 screen_y = 0,
6209 screen_w = 0,
6210 screen_h = 0;
6211# elif defined( RETROFLAT_SOFT_SHAPES )
6212# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_SDL2 )
6213# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_WIN16 ) || defined( RETROFLAT_API_WIN32 )
6214 HBRUSH old_brush = (HBRUSH)NULL;
6215 HPEN old_pen = (HPEN)NULL;
6216# endif /* RETROFLAT_API_WIN16 || RETROFLAT_API_WIN32 */
6217
6218 if( RETROFLAT_COLOR_NULL == color_idx ) {
6219 return;
6220 }
6221
6222# ifndef RETROFLAT_OPENGL
6223 if( NULL == target ) {
6224 target = retroflat_screen_buffer();
6225 }
6226# endif /* !RETROFLAT_OPENGL */
6227
6228# if defined( RETROFLAT_OPENGL )
6229
6230 if( NULL == target || retroflat_screen_buffer() == target ) {
6231
6232 /* Push new overlay projection parms before we create a new overlay. */
6233 retroglu_push_overlay( x, y, screen_x, screen_y, aspect_ratio );
6234 retroglu_whf( w, h, screen_w, screen_h, aspect_ratio );
6235
6236 /* Create the overlay poly with a solid color. */
6237 glBegin( GL_TRIANGLES );
6238 glColor3fv( g_retroflat_state->palette[color_idx] );
6239 glVertex3f( screen_x, screen_y, RETROFLAT_GL_Z );
6240 glVertex3f( screen_x, screen_y - screen_h, RETROFLAT_GL_Z );
6241 glVertex3f( screen_x + screen_w, screen_y - screen_h, RETROFLAT_GL_Z );
6242
6243 glVertex3f( screen_x + screen_w, screen_y - screen_h, RETROFLAT_GL_Z );
6244 glVertex3f( screen_x + screen_w, screen_y, RETROFLAT_GL_Z );
6245 glVertex3f( screen_x, screen_y, RETROFLAT_GL_Z );
6246 glEnd();
6247
6248 retroglu_pop_overlay();
6249 } else {
6250 /* Draw the rect onto the given 2D texture. */
6251 retrosoft_rect( target, color_idx, x, y, w, h, flags );
6252 }
6253
6254# elif defined( RETROFLAT_SOFT_SHAPES )
6255
6256 retrosoft_rect( target, color_idx, x, y, w, h, flags );
6257
6258# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_ALLEGRO )
6259
6260 /* == Allegro == */
6261
6262 assert( NULL != target->b );
6263 if( RETROFLAT_FLAGS_FILL == (RETROFLAT_FLAGS_FILL & flags) ) {
6264 rectfill( target->b, x, y, x + w, y + h,
6265 g_retroflat_state->palette[color_idx] );
6266 } else {
6267 rect( target->b, x, y, x + w, y + h,
6268 g_retroflat_state->palette[color_idx] );
6269 }
6270
6271# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_SDL2 )
6272
6273 assert( retroflat_bitmap_locked( target ) );
6274
6275 area.x = x;
6276 area.y = y;
6277 area.w = w;
6278 area.h = h;
6279
6280 SDL_SetRenderDrawColor(
6281 target->renderer, color->r, color->g, color->b, 255 );
6282
6283 if( RETROFLAT_FLAGS_FILL == (RETROFLAT_FLAGS_FILL & flags) ) {
6284 SDL_RenderFillRect( target->renderer, &area );
6285 } else {
6286 SDL_RenderDrawRect( target->renderer, &area );
6287 }
6288
6289# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_WIN16 ) || defined( RETROFLAT_API_WIN32 )
6290
6291 /* == Win16/Win32 == */
6292
6293 assert( (HBITMAP)NULL != target->b );
6294
6295 assert( retroflat_bitmap_locked( target ) );
6296
6297 retroflat_win_setup_brush( old_brush, target, color_idx, flags );
6298 retroflat_win_setup_pen( old_pen, target, color_idx, flags );
6299
6300 Rectangle( target->hdc_b, x, y, x + w, y + h );
6301
6302/* cleanup: */
6303
6304 retroflat_win_cleanup_brush( old_brush, target )
6305 retroflat_win_cleanup_pen( old_pen, target )
6306
6307# else
6308# pragma message( "warning: rect not implemented" )
6309# endif /* RETROFLAT_API_ALLEGRO || RETROFLAT_API_WIN16 || RETROFLAT_API_WIN32 */
6310}
6311
6312/* === */
6313
6314void retroflat_line(
6315 struct RETROFLAT_BITMAP* target, const RETROFLAT_COLOR color_idx,
6316 int16_t x1, int16_t y1, int16_t x2, int16_t y2, uint8_t flags
6317) {
6318# if defined( RETROFLAT_OPENGL )
6319# elif defined( RETROFLAT_SOFT_LINES )
6320# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_SDL2 )
6321 MERROR_RETVAL retval = MERROR_OK;
6322 RETROFLAT_COLOR_DEF color = g_retroflat_state->palette[color_idx];
6323# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_WIN16 ) || defined( RETROFLAT_API_WIN32 )
6324 HPEN pen = (HPEN)NULL;
6325 HPEN old_pen = (HPEN)NULL;
6326 POINT points[2];
6327# endif /* RETROFLAT_API_WIN16 || RETROFLAT_API_WIN32 */
6328
6329 if( RETROFLAT_COLOR_NULL == color_idx ) {
6330 return;
6331 }
6332
6333# ifndef RETROFLAT_OPENGL
6334 if( NULL == target ) {
6335 target = retroflat_screen_buffer();
6336 }
6337# endif /* !RETROFLAT_OPENGL */
6338
6339# if defined( RETROFLAT_OPENGL )
6340
6341 if( NULL == target || retroflat_screen_buffer() == target ) {
6342 /* TODO: Draw line in ortho. */
6343 } else {
6344 retrosoft_line( target, color_idx, x1, y1, x2, y2, flags );
6345 }
6346
6347# elif defined( RETROFLAT_SOFT_LINES )
6348
6349 retrosoft_line( target, color_idx, x1, y1, x2, y2, flags );
6350
6351# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_ALLEGRO )
6352
6353 /* == Allegro == */
6354
6355 assert( NULL != target->b );
6356 line( target->b, x1, y1, x2, y2, color_idx );
6357
6358# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_SDL2 )
6359
6360 /* == SDL2 == */
6361
6362 assert( retroflat_bitmap_locked( target ) );
6363
6364 SDL_SetRenderDrawColor(
6365 target->renderer, color->r, color->g, color->b, 255 );
6366 SDL_RenderDrawLine( target->renderer, x1, y1, x2, y2 );
6367
6368# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_WIN16 ) || defined( RETROFLAT_API_WIN32 )
6369
6370 /* == Win16/Win32 == */
6371
6372 assert( NULL != target->b );
6373
6374 assert( retroflat_bitmap_locked( target ) );
6375
6376 retroflat_win_setup_pen( old_pen, target, color_idx, flags );
6377
6378 /* Create the line points. */
6379 points[0].x = x1;
6380 points[0].y = y1;
6381 points[1].x = x2;
6382 points[1].y = y2;
6383
6384 Polyline( target->hdc_b, points, 2 );
6385
6386/* cleanup: */
6387
6388 if( (HPEN)NULL != pen ) {
6389 SelectObject( target->hdc_b, old_pen );
6390 DeleteObject( pen );
6391 }
6392
6393# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_PC_BIOS )
6394
6395 /* == DOS PC_BIOS == */
6396
6397 switch( g_retroflat_state->screen_mode ) {
6398 case RETROFLAT_SCREEN_MODE_VGA:
6399 /* TODO: Try accelerated 2D. */
6400 retrosoft_line( target, color_idx, x1, y1, x2, y2, flags );
6401 break;
6402
6403 default:
6404 retrosoft_line( target, color_idx, x1, y1, x2, y2, flags );
6405 break;
6406 }
6407
6408# else
6409# pragma message( "warning: line not implemented" )
6410# endif /* RETROFLAT_API_ALLEGRO || RETROFLAT_API_WIN16 || RETROFLAT_API_WIN32 */
6411}
6412
6413/* === */
6414
6415void retroflat_ellipse(
6416 struct RETROFLAT_BITMAP* target, const RETROFLAT_COLOR color,
6417 int16_t x, int16_t y, int16_t w, int16_t h, uint8_t flags
6418) {
6419# if defined( RETROFLAT_OPENGL )
6420# elif defined( RETROFLAT_SOFT_SHAPES )
6421# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_WIN16 ) || defined( RETROFLAT_API_WIN32 )
6422 HPEN old_pen = (HPEN)NULL;
6423 HBRUSH old_brush = (HBRUSH)NULL;
6424# endif /* RETROFLAT_API_WIN16 || RETROFLAT_API_WIN32 */
6425
6426 if( RETROFLAT_COLOR_NULL == color ) {
6427 return;
6428 }
6429
6430# ifndef RETROFLAT_OPENGL
6431 if( NULL == target ) {
6432 target = retroflat_screen_buffer();
6433 }
6434# endif /* !RETROFLAT_OPENGL */
6435
6436# if defined( RETROFLAT_OPENGL )
6437
6438 if( NULL == target || retroflat_screen_buffer() == target ) {
6439 /* TODO: Draw ellipse in ortho. */
6440 } else {
6441 retrosoft_ellipse( target, color, x, y, w, h, flags );
6442 }
6443
6444# elif defined( RETROFLAT_SOFT_SHAPES )
6445
6446 retrosoft_ellipse( target, color, x, y, w, h, flags );
6447
6448# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_ALLEGRO )
6449
6450 /* == Allegro == */
6451
6452 assert( NULL != target->b );
6453
6454 if( RETROFLAT_FLAGS_FILL == (RETROFLAT_FLAGS_FILL & flags) ) {
6455 /* >> 1 performs better than / 2 on lousy old DOS compilers. */
6456 ellipsefill(
6457 target->b, x + (w >> 1), y + (h >> 1), w >> 1, h >> 1, color );
6458 } else {
6459 /* >> 1 performs better than / 2 on lousy old DOS compilers. */
6460 ellipse( target->b, x + (w >> 1), y + (h >> 1), w >> 1, h >> 1, color );
6461 }
6462
6463# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_WIN16 ) || defined( RETROFLAT_API_WIN32 )
6464
6465 /* == Win16/Win32 == */
6466
6467 assert( NULL != target->b );
6468 assert( retroflat_bitmap_locked( target ) );
6469
6470 retroflat_win_setup_brush( old_brush, target, color, flags );
6471 retroflat_win_setup_pen( old_pen, target, color, flags );
6472
6473 Ellipse( target->hdc_b, x, y, x + w, y + h );
6474
6475/* cleanup: */
6476
6477 retroflat_win_cleanup_brush( old_brush, target )
6478 retroflat_win_cleanup_pen( old_pen, target )
6479
6480# else
6481# pragma message( "warning: ellipse not implemented" )
6482# endif /* RETROFLAT_API_ALLEGRO || RETROFLAT_API_SDL2 || RETROFLAT_API_WIN16 || RETROFLAT_API_WIN32 */
6483}
6484
6485/* === */
6486
6487void retroflat_cursor( struct RETROFLAT_BITMAP* target, uint8_t flags ) {
6488#if 0
6489 char mouse_str[11] = "";
6490
6491 maug_snprintf(
6492 mouse_str, 10, "%02d, %02d", g_retroflat_state->last_mouse_x, g_retroflat_state->last_mouse_y );
6493
6494 retroflat_string(
6495 target, RETROFLAT_COLOR_BLACK,
6496 mouse_str, 10, NULL, 0, 0, 0 );
6497 retroflat_rect(
6498 target, RETROFLAT_COLOR_BLACK,
6499 g_retroflat_state->last_mouse_x - 5, g_retroflat_state->last_mouse_y - 5, 10, 10, 0 );
6500#endif
6501}
6502
6503/* === */
6504
6505# if defined( RETROFLAT_API_WIN16 ) || defined( RETROFLAT_API_WIN32 )
6506
6507# define retroflat_win_create_font( flags, font_str ) \
6508 CreateFont( 10, 0, 0, 0, FW_BOLD, FALSE, FALSE, FALSE, \
6509 DEFAULT_CHARSET, OUT_DEFAULT_PRECIS, CLIP_DEFAULT_PRECIS, \
6510 DEFAULT_QUALITY, DEFAULT_PITCH, \
6511 (NULL == font_str || '\0' == font_str[0] ? "Arial" : font_str) );
6512
6513# endif /* RETROFLAT_API_WIN16 || RETROFLAT_API_WIN32 */
6514
6515void retroflat_string_sz(
6516 struct RETROFLAT_BITMAP* target, const char* str, size_t str_sz,
6517 const char* font_str, size_t* w_out, size_t* h_out, uint8_t flags
6518) {
6519# if defined( RETROFLAT_OPENGL )
6520# elif defined( RETROFLAT_SOFT_SHAPES )
6521# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_ALLEGRO )
6522 FONT* font_data = NULL;
6523 int font_loaded = 0;
6524# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_WIN16 ) || defined( RETROFLAT_API_WIN32 )
6525 SIZE sz;
6526 HFONT font;
6527 HFONT old_font;
6528# endif /* RETROFLAT_API_ALLEGRO || RETROFLAT_API_SDL2 || RETROFLAT_API_WIN16 || RETROFLAT_API_WIN32 */
6529
6530 if( NULL == target ) {
6531 target = retroflat_screen_buffer();
6532 }
6533
6534# if defined( RETROFLAT_OPENGL )
6535
6536 retrosoft_string_sz( target, str, str_sz, font_str, w_out, h_out, flags );
6537
6538# elif defined( RETROFLAT_SOFT_SHAPES )
6539
6540 retrosoft_string_sz( target, str, str_sz, font_str, w_out, h_out, flags );
6541
6542# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_ALLEGRO )
6543
6544 /* == Allegro == */
6545
6546 if( NULL == font_str || '\0' == font_str[0] ) {
6547 font_data = font;
6548 } else {
6549 /* TODO: Cache loaded fonts for later use. */
6550 font_data = load_font( font_str, NULL, NULL );
6551 }
6552 if( NULL == font_data ) {
6553 retroflat_message( RETROFLAT_MSG_FLAG_ERROR,
6554 "Error", "Unable to load font: %s", font_str );
6555 goto cleanup;
6556 }
6557
6558 *w_out = text_length( font_data, str );
6559 *h_out = text_height( font_data );
6560
6561cleanup:
6562
6563 if( font_loaded && NULL != font_data ) {
6564 destroy_font( font_data );
6565 }
6566
6567# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_WIN16 ) || defined( RETROFLAT_API_WIN32 )
6568
6569 /* == Win16/Win32 == */
6570
6571 assert( NULL != target->b );
6572 assert( retroflat_bitmap_locked( target ) );
6573
6574 font = retroflat_win_create_font( flags, font_str );
6575 old_font = SelectObject( target->hdc_b, font );
6576
6577 GetTextExtentPoint( target->hdc_b, str, str_sz, &sz );
6578 *w_out = sz.cx;
6579 *h_out = sz.cy;
6580
6581/* cleanup: */
6582
6583 SelectObject( target->hdc_b, old_font );
6584
6585# else
6586# pragma message( "warning: string sz not implemented" )
6587# endif /* RETROFLAT_API_ALLEGRO || RETROFLAT_API_SDL2 || RETROFLAT_API_WIN16 || RETROFLAT_API_WIN32 */
6588}
6589
6590/* === */
6591
6592void retroflat_string(
6593 struct RETROFLAT_BITMAP* target, const RETROFLAT_COLOR color,
6594 const char* str, int str_sz, const char* font_str, int16_t x_orig, int16_t y_orig,
6595 uint8_t flags
6596) {
6597# if defined( RETROFLAT_OPENGL )
6598 float aspect_ratio = 0,
6599 screen_x = 0,
6600 screen_y = 0;
6601# elif defined( RETROFLAT_SOFT_SHAPES )
6602# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_ALLEGRO )
6603 FONT* font_data = NULL;
6604 int font_loaded = 0;
6605# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_WIN16 ) || defined( RETROFLAT_API_WIN32 )
6606 RECT rect;
6607 SIZE sz;
6608 HFONT font;
6609 HFONT old_font;
6610# endif /* RETROFLAT_API_ALLEGRO || RETROFLAT_API_SDL2 || RETROFLAT_API_WIN16 || RETROFLAT_API_WIN32 */
6611
6612 if( RETROFLAT_COLOR_NULL == color ) {
6613 return;
6614 }
6615
6616# if !defined( RETROFLAT_OPENGL )
6617 if( NULL == target ) {
6618 target = retroflat_screen_buffer();
6619 }
6620# endif /* !RETROFLAT_OPENGL */
6621
6622 if( 0 == str_sz ) {
6623 str_sz = strlen( str );
6624 }
6625
6626# if defined( RETROFLAT_OPENGL )
6627
6628 if( NULL == target || retroflat_screen_buffer() == target ) {
6629 /* Push new overlay projection parms before we create a new overlay. */
6630 retroglu_push_overlay( x_orig, y_orig, screen_x, screen_y, aspect_ratio );
6631
6632 retroglu_string(
6633 screen_x, screen_y, 0,
6634 g_retroflat_state->palette[color], str, str_sz, font_str, flags );
6635
6636 retroglu_pop_overlay();
6637 } else {
6638 /* Assume drawing surface is already configured inside a push_overlay()
6639 * call and draw to its texture. */
6640 retrosoft_string(
6641 target, color, str, str_sz, font_str, x_orig, y_orig, flags );
6642 }
6643
6644# elif defined( RETROFLAT_SOFT_SHAPES )
6645
6646 retrosoft_string(
6647 target, color, str, str_sz, font_str, x_orig, y_orig, flags );
6648
6649# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_ALLEGRO )
6650
6651 /* == Allegro == */
6652
6653 if( NULL == font_str || '\0' == font_str[0] ) {
6654 font_data = font;
6655 } else {
6656 /* TODO: Cache loaded fonts for later use. */
6657 font_data = load_font( font_str, NULL, NULL );
6658 }
6659 if( NULL == font_data ) {
6660 retroflat_message( RETROFLAT_MSG_FLAG_ERROR,
6661 "Error", "Unable to load font: %s", font_str );
6662 goto cleanup;
6663 }
6664
6665 textout_ex( target->b, font_data, str, x_orig, y_orig, color, -1 );
6666
6667cleanup:
6668 if( font_loaded && NULL != font_data ) {
6669 destroy_font( font_data );
6670 }
6671
6672# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_WIN16 ) || defined( RETROFLAT_API_WIN32 )
6673
6674 /* == Win16/Win32 == */
6675
6676 assert( NULL != target->b );
6677
6678 assert( retroflat_bitmap_locked( target ) );
6679
6680 /* DrawText will draw gibberish even if the string is null-terminated! */
6681 str_sz = strlen( str );
6682
6683 memset( &sz, '\0', sizeof( SIZE ) );
6684
6685 font = retroflat_win_create_font( flags, font_str );
6686 old_font = SelectObject( target->hdc_b, font );
6687
6688 GetTextExtentPoint( target->hdc_b, str, str_sz, &sz );
6689 rect.left = x_orig;
6690 rect.top = y_orig;
6691 rect.right = (x_orig + sz.cx);
6692 rect.bottom = (y_orig + sz.cy);
6693
6694 SetTextColor( target->hdc_b, g_retroflat_state->palette[color] );
6695 SetBkMode( target->hdc_b, TRANSPARENT );
6696
6697 DrawText( target->hdc_b, str, str_sz, &rect, 0 );
6698
6699/* cleanup: */
6700
6701 SelectObject( target->hdc_b, old_font );
6702
6703 SetBkMode( target->hdc_b, OPAQUE );
6704 SetTextColor( target->hdc_b,
6705 g_retroflat_state->palette[RETROFLAT_COLOR_BLACK] );
6706
6707# else
6708# pragma message( "warning: string not implemented" )
6709# endif /* RETROFLAT_API_ALLEGRO || RETROFLAT_API_SDL2 || RETROFLAT_API_WIN16 || RETROFLAT_API_WIN32 */
6710}
6711
6712/* === */
6713
6714void retroflat_get_palette( uint8_t idx, uint32_t* p_rgb ) {
6715
6716# ifdef RETROFLAT_OPENGL
6717
6718 *p_rgb = 0;
6719 *p_rgb |= g_retroflat_state->tex_palette[idx][0] & 0xff;
6720 *p_rgb |= (g_retroflat_state->tex_palette[idx][1] & 0xff) << 8;
6721 *p_rgb |= (g_retroflat_state->tex_palette[idx][2] & 0xff) << 16;
6722
6723# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_SDL2 )
6724
6725 *p_rgb = 0;
6726 *p_rgb |= g_retroflat_state->palette[idx].b & 0xff;
6727 *p_rgb |= ((g_retroflat_state->palette[idx].g & 0xff) << 8);
6728 *p_rgb |= ((g_retroflat_state->palette[idx].r & 0xff) << 16);
6729
6730# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_PC_BIOS )
6731
6732 /* Set VGA mask register. */
6733 switch( g_retroflat_state->screen_mode ) {
6734 case RETROFLAT_SCREEN_MODE_VGA:
6735 outp( 0x3c6, 0xff );
6736 outp( 0x3c7, idx );
6737 *p_rgb = 0;
6738 *p_rgb |= ((uint32_t)(inp( 0x3c9 ) & 0xff) << 16);
6739 *p_rgb |= ((uint32_t)(inp( 0x3c9 ) & 0xff) << 8);
6740 *p_rgb |= (inp( 0x3c9 ) & 0xff);
6741 break;
6742
6743 default:
6744 error_printf( "could not set palette index %d in screen mode %d!",
6745 idx, g_retroflat_state->screen_mode );
6746 break;
6747 }
6748
6749# else
6750# pragma message( "warning: get palette not implemented" )
6751# endif
6752
6753}
6754
6755/* === */
6756
6757MERROR_RETVAL retroflat_set_palette( uint8_t idx, uint32_t rgb ) {
6758 MERROR_RETVAL retval = MERROR_OK;
6759# if defined( RETROFLAT_API_PC_BIOS )
6760 uint8_t byte_buffer = 0;
6761# endif /* RETROFLAT_API_PC_BIOS */
6762
6763 debug_printf( 3,
6764 "setting texture palette #%u to " UPRINTF_X32_FMT "...",
6765 idx, rgb );
6766
6767# ifdef RETROFLAT_OPENGL
6768
6769 g_retroflat_state->tex_palette[idx][0] = rgb & 0xff;
6770 g_retroflat_state->tex_palette[idx][1] = (rgb & 0xff00) >> 8;
6771 g_retroflat_state->tex_palette[idx][2] = (rgb & 0xff0000) >> 16;
6772
6773# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_SDL2 )
6774
6775 g_retroflat_state->palette[idx].b = rgb & 0xff;
6776 g_retroflat_state->palette[idx].g = (rgb & 0xff00) >> 8;
6777 g_retroflat_state->palette[idx].r = (rgb & 0xff0000) >> 16;
6778
6779# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_PC_BIOS )
6780
6781 /* Set VGA mask register. */
6782 switch( g_retroflat_state->screen_mode ) {
6783 case RETROFLAT_SCREEN_MODE_VGA:
6784 /* TODO: This doesn't seem to be working in DOSBox? */
6785 outp( 0x3c6, 0xff );
6786 outp( 0x3c8, idx );
6787
6788 byte_buffer = (rgb >> 16) & 0x3f;
6789 debug_printf( 1, "r: %u", byte_buffer );
6790 outp( 0x3c9, byte_buffer );
6791
6792 byte_buffer = (rgb >> 8) & 0x3f;
6793 debug_printf( 1, "g: %u", byte_buffer );
6794 outp( 0x3c9, byte_buffer );
6795
6796 byte_buffer = rgb & 0x3f;
6797 debug_printf( 1, "b: %u", byte_buffer );
6798 outp( 0x3c9, byte_buffer );
6799 break;
6800
6801 default:
6802 error_printf( "could not set palette index %d in screen mode %d!",
6803 idx, g_retroflat_state->screen_mode );
6804 break;
6805 }
6806
6807# else
6808# pragma message( "warning: set palette not implemented" )
6809# endif
6810
6811 return retval;
6812}
6813
6814/* === */
6815
6816void retroflat_set_proc_resize(
6817 retroflat_proc_resize_t on_resize_in, void* data_in
6818) {
6819 g_retroflat_state->on_resize = on_resize_in;
6820 g_retroflat_state->on_resize_data = data_in;
6821}
6822
6823/* === */
6824
6825void retroflat_resize_v() {
6826# if defined( RETROFLAT_API_SDL2 )
6827
6828 g_retroflat_state->screen_v_w = g_retroflat_state->screen_w;
6829 g_retroflat_state->screen_v_h = g_retroflat_state->screen_h;
6830
6831 assert( NULL != g_retroflat_state->buffer.texture );
6832 SDL_DestroyTexture( g_retroflat_state->buffer.texture );
6833
6834 /* Create the buffer texture. */
6835 g_retroflat_state->buffer.texture =
6836 SDL_CreateTexture( g_retroflat_state->buffer.renderer,
6837 SDL_PIXELFORMAT_RGBA8888, SDL_TEXTUREACCESS_TARGET,
6838 g_retroflat_state->screen_w, g_retroflat_state->screen_h );
6839
6840# endif /* RETROFLAT_API_SDL2 */
6841}
6842
6843/* === */
6844
6845RETROFLAT_IN_KEY retroflat_poll_input( struct RETROFLAT_INPUT* input ) {
6846# if defined( RETROFLAT_OS_DOS ) || defined( RETROFLAT_OS_DOS_REAL )
6847 union REGS inregs;
6848 union REGS outregs;
6849# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_SDL1 ) || defined( RETROFLAT_API_SDL2 )
6850 int eres = 0;
6851 SDL_Event event;
6852# endif /* RETROFLAT_API_ALLEGRO && RETROFLAT_OS_DOS */
6853 RETROFLAT_IN_KEY key_out = 0;
6854
6855 assert( NULL != input );
6856
6857 input->key_flags = 0;
6858
6859# if defined( RETROFLAT_API_ALLEGRO )
6860
6861 /* == Allegro == */
6862
6863 if( g_retroflat_state->close_button ) {
6864 retroflat_quit( 0 );
6865 return 0;
6866 }
6867
6868# ifdef RETROFLAT_OS_DOS
6869
6870 /* Poll the mouse. */
6871 inregs.w.ax = 3;
6872 int386( 0x33, &inregs, &outregs );
6873
6874 if(
6875 1 == outregs.x.ebx && /* Left button clicked. */
6876 outregs.w.cx != g_retroflat_state->last_mouse_x &&
6877 outregs.w.dx != g_retroflat_state->last_mouse_y
6878 ) {
6879 input->mouse_x = outregs.w.cx;
6880 input->mouse_y = outregs.w.dx;
6881
6882 /* Prevent repeated clicks. */
6883 g_retroflat_state->last_mouse_x = input->mouse_x;
6884 g_retroflat_state->last_mouse_y = input->mouse_y;
6885
6886 return RETROFLAT_MOUSE_B_LEFT;
6887 } else {
6888 g_retroflat_state->last_mouse_x = outregs.w.cx;
6889 g_retroflat_state->last_mouse_y = outregs.w.dx;
6890 }
6891
6892# else
6893 /* Allegro mouse is broken in DOS. */
6894 poll_mouse();
6895 if( mouse_b & 0x01 ) {
6896 input->mouse_x = mouse_x;
6897 input->mouse_y = mouse_y;
6898 return RETROFLAT_MOUSE_B_LEFT;
6899 } else if( mouse_b & 0x02 ) {
6900 input->mouse_x = mouse_x;
6901 input->mouse_y = mouse_y;
6902 return RETROFLAT_MOUSE_B_RIGHT;
6903 }
6904# endif /* RETROFLAT_OS_DOS */
6905
6906 poll_keyboard();
6907 if( keypressed() ) {
6908 /* TODO: ??? */
6909 if( KB_SHIFT_FLAG == (KB_SHIFT_FLAG & key_shifts) ) {
6910 input->key_flags |= RETROFLAT_INPUT_MOD_SHIFT;
6911 }
6912
6913 if( KB_CTRL_FLAG == (KB_CTRL_FLAG & key_shifts) ) {
6914 input->key_flags |= RETROFLAT_INPUT_MOD_CTRL;
6915 }
6916
6917 if( KB_ALT_FLAG == (KB_ALT_FLAG & key_shifts) ) {
6918 input->key_flags |= RETROFLAT_INPUT_MOD_ALT;
6919 }
6920
6921 return (readkey() >> 8);
6922 }
6923
6924# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_SDL1 ) || defined( RETROFLAT_API_SDL2 )
6925
6926 /* == SDL == */
6927
6928 SDL_PollEvent( &event );
6929
6930 switch( event.type ) {
6931 case SDL_QUIT:
6932 /* Handle SDL window close. */
6933 retroflat_quit( 0 );
6934 break;
6935
6936 case SDL_KEYDOWN:
6937 key_out = event.key.keysym.sym;
6938
6939 if(
6940 KMOD_RSHIFT == (KMOD_RSHIFT & event.key.keysym.mod) ||
6941 KMOD_LSHIFT == (KMOD_LSHIFT & event.key.keysym.mod)
6942 ) {
6943 input->key_flags |= RETROFLAT_INPUT_MOD_SHIFT;
6944 }
6945
6946 if( KMOD_CTRL == (KMOD_CTRL & event.key.keysym.mod) ) {
6947 input->key_flags |= RETROFLAT_INPUT_MOD_CTRL;
6948 }
6949
6950 if( KMOD_ALT == (KMOD_ALT & event.key.keysym.mod) ) {
6951 input->key_flags |= RETROFLAT_INPUT_MOD_ALT;
6952 }
6953
6954 /* Flush key buffer to improve responsiveness. */
6955 if(
6956 RETROFLAT_FLAGS_KEY_REPEAT !=
6957 (RETROFLAT_FLAGS_KEY_REPEAT & g_retroflat_state->retroflat_flags)
6958 ) {
6959 while( (eres = SDL_PollEvent( &event )) );
6960 }
6961 break;
6962
6963 case SDL_MOUSEBUTTONUP:
6964 /* Stop dragging. */
6965 g_retroflat_state->mouse_state = 0;
6966 break;
6967
6968 case SDL_MOUSEBUTTONDOWN:
6969
6970 /* Begin dragging. */
6971
6972 input->mouse_x = event.button.x;
6973 input->mouse_y = event.button.y;
6974
6975 /* Differentiate which button was clicked. */
6976 if( SDL_BUTTON_LEFT == event.button.button ) {
6977 key_out = RETROFLAT_MOUSE_B_LEFT;
6978 g_retroflat_state->mouse_state = RETROFLAT_MOUSE_B_LEFT;
6979 } else if( SDL_BUTTON_RIGHT == event.button.button ) {
6980 key_out = RETROFLAT_MOUSE_B_RIGHT;
6981 g_retroflat_state->mouse_state = RETROFLAT_MOUSE_B_RIGHT;
6982 }
6983
6984 /* Flush key buffer to improve responsiveness. */
6985 /*while( (eres = SDL_PollEvent( &event )) );*/
6986 break;
6987
6988# if !defined( RETROFLAT_API_SDL1 )
6989 case SDL_WINDOWEVENT:
6990 switch( event.window.event ) {
6991 case SDL_WINDOWEVENT_RESIZED:
6992 retroflat_on_resize( event.window.data1, event.window.data2 );
6993 if( NULL != g_retroflat_state->on_resize ) {
6994 g_retroflat_state->on_resize(
6995 event.window.data1, event.window.data2,
6996 g_retroflat_state->on_resize_data );
6997 }
6998 break;
6999 }
7000 break;
7001# endif /* !RETROFLAT_API_SDL1 */
7002
7003 default:
7004 /* Check for mouse dragging if mouse was previously held down. */
7005 if( 0 != g_retroflat_state->mouse_state ) {
7006 /* Update coordinates and keep dragging. */
7007 SDL_GetMouseState( &(input->mouse_x), &(input->mouse_y) );
7008 key_out = g_retroflat_state->mouse_state;
7009 }
7010 break;
7011 }
7012
7013# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_WIN16 ) || defined( RETROFLAT_API_WIN32 )
7014
7015 /* == Win16/Win32 == */
7016
7017 if( g_retroflat_state->last_key ) {
7018 /* Return g_retroflat_state->last_key, which is set in WndProc when a keypress msg is
7019 * received.
7020 */
7021 key_out = g_retroflat_state->last_key;
7022 input->key_flags = g_retroflat_state->vk_mods;
7023
7024 debug_printf( RETROFLAT_KB_TRACE_LVL, "raw key: 0x%04x", key_out );
7025
7026 /* Reset pressed key. */
7027 g_retroflat_state->last_key = 0;
7028
7029 } else if( g_retroflat_state->last_mouse ) {
7030 if( MK_LBUTTON == (MK_LBUTTON & g_retroflat_state->last_mouse) ) {
7031 input->mouse_x = g_retroflat_state->last_mouse_x;
7032 input->mouse_y = g_retroflat_state->last_mouse_y;
7033 key_out = RETROFLAT_MOUSE_B_LEFT;
7034 } else if( MK_RBUTTON == (MK_RBUTTON & g_retroflat_state->last_mouse) ) {
7035 input->mouse_x = g_retroflat_state->last_mouse_x;
7036 input->mouse_y = g_retroflat_state->last_mouse_y;
7037 key_out = RETROFLAT_MOUSE_B_RIGHT;
7038 }
7039 g_retroflat_state->last_mouse = 0;
7040 g_retroflat_state->last_mouse_x = 0;
7041 g_retroflat_state->last_mouse_y = 0;
7042 }
7043
7044# ifdef RETROFLAT_SCREENSAVER
7045 if(
7046 (RETROFLAT_FLAGS_SCREENSAVER ==
7047 (RETROFLAT_FLAGS_SCREENSAVER & g_retroflat_state->retroflat_flags))
7048 && 0 != key_out
7049 ) {
7050 /* retroflat_quit( 0 ); */
7051 }
7052# endif /* RETROFLAT_SCREENSAVER */
7053
7054# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_GLUT )
7055
7056 /* TODO: Implement RETROFLAT_MOD_SHIFT. */
7057
7058 key_out = g_retroflat_state->retroflat_last_key;
7059 g_retroflat_state->retroflat_last_key = 0;
7060
7061 /* TODO: Handle mouse. */
7062
7063# elif defined( RETROFLAT_API_PC_BIOS )
7064
7065 /* TODO: Poll the mouse. */
7066
7067 /* TODO: Implement RETROFLAT_MOD_SHIFT. */
7068
7069 if( kbhit() ) {
7070 /* Poll the keyboard. */
7071 key_out = getch();
7072 debug_printf( 2, "key: 0x%02x", key_out );
7073 if( 0 == key_out ) {
7074 /* Special key was pressed that returns two scan codes. */
7075 key_out = getch();
7076 switch( key_out ) {
7077 case 0x48: key_out = RETROFLAT_KEY_UP; break;
7078 case 0x4b: key_out = RETROFLAT_KEY_LEFT; break;
7079 case 0x4d: key_out = RETROFLAT_KEY_RIGHT; break;
7080 case 0x50: key_out = RETROFLAT_KEY_DOWN; break;
7081 case 0x4f: key_out = RETROFLAT_KEY_HOME; break;
7082 case 0x47: key_out = RETROFLAT_KEY_END; break;
7083 case 0x51: key_out = RETROFLAT_KEY_PGDN; break;
7084 case 0x49: key_out = RETROFLAT_KEY_PGUP; break;
7085 case 0x53: key_out = RETROFLAT_KEY_DELETE; break;
7086 }
7087 }
7088 if(
7089 RETROFLAT_FLAGS_KEY_REPEAT !=
7090 (RETROFLAT_FLAGS_KEY_REPEAT & g_retroflat_state->retroflat_flags)
7091 ) {
7092 while( kbhit() ) {
7093 getch();
7094 }
7095 }
7096 }
7097
7098# else
7099# pragma message( "warning: poll input not implemented" )
7100# endif /* RETROFLAT_API_ALLEGRO || RETROFLAT_API_SDL1 || RETROFLAT_API_SDL2 || RETROFLAT_API_WIN16 || RETROFLAT_API_WIN32 */
7101
7102 /* TODO: Handle NDS input! */
7103
7104 return key_out;
7105}
7106
7107/* === */
7108
7109#elif !defined( RETROVDP_C ) /* End of RETROFLT_C */

7112 extern MAUG_CONST RETROFLAT_COLOR RETROFLAT_COLOR_ ## name_u;
7113
7114RETROFLAT_COLOR_TABLE( RETROFLAT_COLOR_TABLE_CONSTS )
